name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: This is a pretty big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Once again, our race is rated as one of the BEST and ONLY chances Democrats have to flip a Senate seat in 2022.
#
This is a pretty big deal:
CNN just updated their Senate rankings for November — and guess what? **Once again, our race is rated as one of the BEST and ONLY chances Democrats have to flip a Senate seat in 2022.**
Erica Smith is the minister, teacher, three-term state senator, and life-long fighter for working people building a diverse, working-class coalition across North Carolina to get it done. But she needs your help.
**Our primary election is less than four months away** , and we set a mid-month goal of raising $2,500 before Monday to fund our critical statewide organizing efforts and reach as many voters as possible.
[**Can Erica count on you to chip in $5 now? Our mid-month deadline is on Monday at midnight, so we only have a few days left to reach this important goal.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26168?refcode=em20211112-other-629&t=1&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26168?refcode=em20211112-629&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)**
This race is a golden, once-in-a-generation opportunity for progressive Democrats to flip another Senate seat.
But truth is, it takes a lot of money to run and win in North Carolina. Some people are doubting us because Erica doesn’t come from wealth and refuses to be bought by CEOs, corporations, or fossil fuel companies.
Showing we can build a mass movement behind our historic, progressive campaign — without taking a dime from corporate PACs or special interests — is how we prove we have the strength to win this competitive primary and this U.S. Senate seat.
[**Together, we can elect one of us for ALL of us. Chip in $5 — or whatever you can afford — right now to help us reach our $2,500 mid-month fundraising goal and flip North Carolina blue in 2022.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26168?refcode=em20211112-other-629&t=21&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)
Thanks,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211112-629-footer&t=22&refcode2=629_3698_bHz70o&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=629%2E3698%2EbHz70o)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

| | | | They’re on the same team

Friend,

Liz Cheney has officially joined Nancy Pelosi’s Team. The photographs of her with Adam Schiff, Speaker Pelosi, and other Democrats say it all. At a time when true Conservative warriors are fighting the left to Save America, Liz Cheney is playing for the other team.

This is why President Donald J. Trump has endorsed my campaign. This moment is too big for Republicans to be joining sides with the radical left Democrats. When I am elected, I will always put America First.

Liz Cheney has never embraced the America First agenda, from supporting endless wars, to fighting President Trump instead of helping him Make America Great Again. Liz Cheney insults the will of the people of Wyoming, and all Republicans, every day she serves in Congress.

If you are ready for a true Republican Congress that puts America First and fights for President Trump, I need your help today.

name: Josh Mandel
subject: Critical question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:

subject: This is how we win back the Senate majority

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6cad7942598a4f09a602369b2011506e&_e=SSPpBmNGY4UOLqTNf0nARXpUW6ysfz8BGjXnMCUeVGSRS7kM3Q0sJ59H7DXajBT3F7ffG61LNIkzAt0qwTTCJVO6tVCXAqIbiGY8QcrxSvV_SV4M-QkhVvwA16pdqqNa0GxBBpuOkJnKR6YyqpfLENgCiwvYc77Pd62Sqxeitz2HOj5WzdeanCTXqzFJ_y5UahjSCiPRdOpSP2xFSt0nq6uxFUI4qYC28iVPU0UE1Fp5HNc4fuuBrlmN7O-TZ15TQo_18ECetIylp7BHmmPku6vL6Ob66Oi27P51psO1TWdXrKkQRa6Fu245PiXgoph2m6fWeu6Oqd3FvErIZhiwymSBjH03BQYTBrMj14jTx_nXsnzUq0EYPLMwlICprtzoCW2lY4SQ1rJPtAi2fWV-XOgVJMVTQGioKdpkhTF3xJ0A31MzVbLCfxBp6xyJV3pXI0KketoBH8ri9XDf8dY2kg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6cad7942598a4f09a602369b2011506e&_e=SSPpBmNGY4UOLqTNf0nARXpUW6ysfz8BGjXnMCUeVGSRS7kM3Q0sJ59H7DXajBT3F7ffG61LNIkzAt0qwTTCJVO6tVCXAqIbiGY8QcrxSvV_SV4M-QkhVvwA16pdqqNa0GxBBpuOkJnKR6YyqpfLENgCiwvYc77Pd62Sqxeitz2HOj5WzdeanCTXqzFJ_y5UahjSCiPRdOpSP2xFSt0nq6uxFUI4qYC28iVPU0UE1Fp5HNc4fuuBrlmN7O-TZ15TDt-fp2uhNVMgVdd9_5aDXZs7Tu-FHCGN7Mp4TQvNcdtjk1crO-B5u5fg9Af9uePayCc0rwjZEHkR5_y6VqzbEzLCcbaW7UUKbZhCVDgyrEeRexgKhDaWyjl-VpY2zNrmU5rgvYCMSq7SG_luX_chnlxgDlG3xV9INDGb5LEeBo6bEjO0goJKRMitYKRUXbedSJHSNS2frjkp0jHecCEM7A%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6cad7942598a4f09a602369b2011506e&_e=SSPpBmNGY4UOLqTNf0nARXpUW6ysfz8BGjXnMCUeVGSRS7kM3Q0sJ59H7DXajBT3F7ffG61LNIkzAt0qwTTCJVO6tVCXAqIbiGY8QcrxSvV_SV4M-QkhVvwA16pdqqNa0GxBBpuOkJnKR6YyqpfLENgCiwvYc77Pd62Sqxeitz2HOj5WzdeanCTXqzFJ_y5UahjSCiPRdOpSP2xFSt0nq6uxFUI4qYC28iVPU0UE1Fp5HNc4fuuBrlmN7O-TZ15T53yp3xWSF2NO50q0Mm-L5hN-kBvq2ZacwnmBlNCp8RKMBkQuUU3JQmPO1R9DucPjzHVNditM0l8VTYdnIoR7Y5q1L8qBy9rKTn9R_WBsD_R33Nql9gWeeixAfbZUe6hd_zcpOt2SGnNWXgxjqKBPgxkhrXwBuuGFutW4woDTPi2UbZWrVWrFt8GLK0_qOQYZoris1oQ-qUFBX4O2dr7g4w%3D%3D)
I am running against Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud Democrat who has voted for every idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6cad7942598a4f09a602369b2011506e&_e=SSPpBmNGY4UOLqTNf0nARXpUW6ysfz8BGjXnMCUeVGSRS7kM3Q0sJ59H7DXajBT3F7ffG61LNIkzAt0qwTTCJVO6tVCXAqIbiGY8QcrxSvV_SV4M-QkhVvwA16pdqqNa0GxBBpuOkJnKR6YyqpfLENgCiwvYc77Pd62Sqxeitz2HOj5WzdeanCTXqzFJ_y5UahjSCiPRdOpSP2xFSt0nq6uxFUI4qYC28iVPU0UE1Fp5HNc4fuuBrlmN7O-TZ15TqUZUJ-PLQE6adpmOTOrf1nAb0hXg3IZc--VpiKom1KVBQe1jat0HXobAjxpUSoEqlmpy7SHuRCCtmKzL562ibTb8WIVxsonSt18HOlnPPHUxQ22y0kZJdIGYk1HMntKlcK9x6Kccisqm1_Nf6m6iZBq1UibK8H3CNvaAkwl0_IDM070pSU4AGB7ijMR3qe15FbhGOcy4XfFpw5S3OZQaVA%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6cad7942598a4f09a602369b2011506e&_e=SSPpBmNGY4UOLqTNf0nARXpUW6ysfz8BGjXnMCUeVGSRS7kM3Q0sJ59H7DXajBT3F7ffG61LNIkzAt0qwTTCJVO6tVCXAqIbiGY8QcrxSvV_SV4M-QkhVvwA16pdqqNa0GxBBpuOkJnKR6YyqpfLENgCiwvYc77Pd62Sqxeitz2HOj5WzdeanCTXqzFJ_y5UahjSCiPRdOpSP2xFSt0nq6uxFUI4qYC28iVPU0UE1Fp5HNc4fuuBrlmN7O-TZ15Tipmn2OjXRbvL_f7JENUmewj2_AJZpQAi1at9mM0stz_DWhSDN1em_TrzNg_jDL7aXk-rfIYc8ALhCY2rYLG919WHquyM_46l_mea5DSwGqtuNHSGHD-9A37tK19-Sqpwss4wdCABsv9IzX4wzwlwSuGL1vbS3xNpq89wCTWuRBNb2SriBNGRR1h3w6d2ASpCaHXFZbmVMjO1pe-wjhuxvA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Some hope out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Even as we celebrate our victories, we must keep fighting.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/wm_9cVaZ_6C3/R3cxZ1BQTDlYT1NoaW9MMzNPSWVnUXVLQVdkaEFSamMrL2d4R0dCQXBDMVMySVAyUTUwbVZsUm9sSTVITkhNOHFEU05NWXlIc3pVLzRZeU53M2xJOHNHYjhiRGFkRmR5YnpNaXVoR29KTms9S0/cmZDNE5JV3dxUEFNeTFRbGpFQmloVlhJRHhPeXViRlY0Sk5Ic3JRQW5FNG9VNm1oeGIzcElTTTBPanJQU2pLS244SkVrL01IZ3dGb2h0VEh5NHZicHlIRU5hYXBTK3dkS0) Friend, I wanted to take a moment to share with you two groundbreaking achievements out of Congress this week. **First, on Saturday, the House passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill that will invest $1.2 trillion into our nation 's crumbling infrastructure.** This crucial bill will bring communities in Vermont and across the country into the 21st century through historic investments in public transit, clean water, and broadband. The Senate passed this bill nearly two months ago, and President Biden is expected to sign the bill on Monday. **Second, I was proud to recommend and have confirmed Vermonter Judge Beth Robinson to serve on a federal court of appeals.** Judge Robinson has been a tireless advocate for equality and justice, and will be the first LGBTQ woman to _ever_ serve on a federal appellate court. While these are two pieces of great news for our country, we have a lot more to do this year; starting with passing the Build Back Better Act and making sure our government stays open. It's time for my fellow senators and members of Congress to turn our attention toward addressing the climate crisis and delivering even more resources to families across the nation, including paid family leave, expanded access to healthcare, and affordable college. **[But to keep our momentum up and get this bill passed, we'll need to raise our voices together in support of this important legislation. Will you add your name right now in support of the Build Back Better Act? ](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)** Even as we celebrate our victories, we must keep fighting for progress. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---

clean_body: Even as we celebrate our victories, we must keep fighting. | Friend, I wanted to take a moment to share with you two groundbreaking achievements out of Congress this week. First, on Saturday, the House passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill that will invest $1.2 trillion into our nation 's crumbling infrastructure. This crucial bill will bring communities in Vermont and across the country into the 21st century through historic investments in public transit, clean water, and broadband. The Senate passed this bill nearly two months ago, and President Biden is expected to sign the bill on Monday. Second, I was proud to recommend and have confirmed Vermonter Judge Beth Robinson to serve on a federal court of appeals. Judge Robinson has been a tireless advocate for equality and justice, and will be the first LGBTQ woman to ever serve on a federal appellate court. While these are two pieces of great news for our country, we have a lot more to do this year; starting with passing the Build Back Better Act and making sure our government stays open. It's time for my fellow senators and members of Congress to turn our attention toward addressing the climate crisis and delivering even more resources to families across the nation, including paid family leave, expanded access to healthcare, and affordable college. Even as we celebrate our victories, we must keep fighting for progress. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Patrick Leahy U.S. Senator |

Let’s Kick Her out of Congress
| | | | Let’s Kick Her out of Congress

Friend,
I have been fighting for Wyoming for most of my professional career. I relentlessly fought the Clinton Administration in the ’90s when they tried to deny access, management, and use of our National Forest Lands.

I now have a new battle on my hands, and I intend to win. Liz Cheney betrayed the people of Wyoming in Congress and she does not deserve the privilege of representing our great state. Liz Cheney voted to impeach our President, Donald J. Trump without affording him even the most basic due process and has now joined Nancy Pelosi’s team as the radical left continues its anti-Trump agenda.

Liz Cheney does not represent our state, conservative values, or the 75 million Americans that voted for one of the greatest Presidents in History, Donald J. Trump.

Instead of fighting the radical Biden Administration, whose agenda is hellbent on destroying America, Liz Cheney is teaming up with Crazy Nancy Pelosi for her mission to paint 75 million patriotic Americans as terrorists on the “Unselect” January 6th Commission.

Liz Cheney is a bitter loser and she knows her time in Congress is coming to an end. But in order to defeat Liz Cheney once and for all, I need your help today. America First Republicans must join my team.

[_**If you want to Defeat Liz Cheney, Join my Team Today! >>>**_](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=99f7aba1a2584013ad4f903729db9a63&_e=6mDMVbnK46nY2mOqBpOYiJj5zoW8JNb309u_r1eF8UuenLLSrXZSKNLP4ybtZqxFbVEu6Rl7JUaxS3J-5eTwreyDgm5_EuqcVz1FfuJ_VPA76BNmZMuw0onLhZj8HhX48zVU_jmf493x1yYDqEiO1gAYzQn1gAWj2_HVKr3Ah-zqBS4PD5qOsvund9wBsWNHqQJnZo_yaGZXGYmNYymSHAc3sdZWRNKOcyvumZzN94f1YNDz5tJDytIhS12NgfXqPDf5CmTTpgztqucI_Gn5_TMdDwUETfTb4skpB9pTBu89t_l4Is5B8tgQq1oFyrCf9lQx2NUhTRWKY9KguWNTq9mpF1j4h7d8eDIUyTDz7ww%3D)

clean_body: Let’s Kick Her out of Congress | | | | Let’s Kick Her out of Congress Friend, I have been fighting for Wyoming for most of my professional career. I relentlessly fought the Clinton Administration in the ’90s when they tried to deny access, management, and use of our National Forest Lands. I now have a new battle on my hands, and I intend to win. Liz Cheney betrayed the people of Wyoming in Congress and she does not deserve the privilege of representing our great state. Liz Cheney voted to impeach our President, Donald J. Trump without affording him even the most basic due process and has now joined Nancy Pelosi’s team as the radical left continues its anti-Trump agenda. Liz Cheney does not represent our state, conservative values, or the 75 million Americans that voted for one of the greatest Presidents in History, Donald J. Trump. Instead of fighting the radical Biden Administration, whose agenda is hellbent on destroying America, Liz Cheney is teaming up with Crazy Nancy Pelosi for her mission to paint 75 million patriotic Americans as terrorists on the “Unselect” January 6th Commission. Liz Cheney is a bitter loser and she knows her time in Congress is coming to an end. But in order to defeat Liz Cheney once and for all, I need your help today. America First Republicans must join my team. Together, we can take Wyoming’s Congressional Seat Back, and restore those bedrock principles found in our Constitution to their rightful place. I will fight to stop the radical left from destroying our country, not join in their efforts. The choice is clear, a Trump endorsed, America First Republican vs. Liz Cheney, a Nancy Pelosi, pro-impeachment hack. Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | | [Unsubscribe]() Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Tom Fitton
subject: New Ashli Babbitt Audio, Video, and Photos from DC Police
body:
Clinton Connections Behind ‘Steele Dossier’ Smear Coming to Light

[WEEKLY UPDATE]

New Ashli Babbitt Audio, Video, and Photos from DC Police

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26292&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2JhYmJpdHQtYmFubm9uLW9rZWVmZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTMwMjMyMjA=]

DC POLICE RELEASE AUDIO, VIDEO, PHOTOS IN ASHLI BABBITT KILLING

Piece by piece we’re putting together a clearer picture of the
unnecessary shooting death of Ashli Babbitt on January 6, 2021, in the
U.S. Capitol Building. Our suspicion about the tragic affair is
heightened by the government’s recalcitrance in releasing the
information it has.

This week we received multiple audio, visual and photo records from
the DC Metropolitan Police Department about death at the hands of a
Capitol Police officer. The records include a cell phone video
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26288&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctdi1kYy1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LW5vdmVtYmVyLTIwMjEtYXVkaW8tMDAxNzEwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
of
the shooting and an audio
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26288&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctdi1kYy1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LW5vdmVtYmVyLTIwMjEtYXVkaW8tMDAxNzEwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
of
a brief police interview of the shooter, Lt. Michael Byrd.

We obtained the material through a May 2021 FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=25506&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jYXBpdG9sLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
filed
after DC officials failed to respond to two April, 2021 FOIA requests
to the Metropolitan Police Department and the Office of the Chief
Medical Examiner for records related to Babbitt’s death (_Judicial
Watch v. The District of Columbia_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=24983&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGlzdHJpY3Qtb2YtY29sb21iaWEtYXNobGktYmFiYml0dC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAxNzEwLWIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTEzMDIzMjIw]
(No.
2021 CA 001710 B)).

Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior
window in the United States Capitol. She was unarmed, and a 14-year
Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by
Congress as well as federal and local authorities for eight months
until U.S. Capitol Police officer Michael Byrd went public to try to
defend his killing of Babbitt.

The new records include a new cell phone video, edited by the DC
police, that depicts police reacting to the shooting.

Also included among the records is an audio recording
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26288&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctdi1kYy1hc2hsaS1iYWJiaXR0LW5vdmVtYmVyLTIwMjEtYXVkaW8tMDAxNzEwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
of
an interview of Lt. Michael Byrd by the DC Metropolitan Police on
January 6, 2021. The voices in Byrd’s and other witness interview
audio recordings are all digitally altered to try to hide identities.

The documents also include photos
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26289&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGMtYXNobGktYmFiYml0dC1waG90b3Mtbm92ZW1iZXItMjAyMS0wMDE3MTAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTEzMDIzMjIw]
of
the area where Babbitt was killed and DC police photographs of Lt.
Byrd, his hands, and his gun. The photos also include pictures of a
folding knife reportedly found in Babbitt’s pocket.

Other audio interviews of witnesses provide first-hand accounts of the
shooting.

Last month, also as a result of this lawsuit, we released records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26290&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctYmFiYml0dC1uZXctaW5mby8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTMwMjMyMjA=]
from the DC
Police about the shooting death of Babbitt, showing that multiple
officers claimed they didn’t see a weapon in Babbitt’s hand before
Byrd shot her, and Byrd was visibly distraught afterward. One officer
attested that he didn’t hear any verbal commands before Byrd shot
Babbitt. The new records include audio recordings of these witness
interviews. The records also include internal communications about
Byrd’s case and a crime scene examination report.

These recordings and photos provide dramatic, first-hand evidence that
the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt was unjustified. It is disturbing
that neither the Pelosi Congress not the Biden/Garland DOJ took no
action over this needless death.

We also filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=25974&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1yZWNvcmRzLWRvai8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTMwMjMyMjA=]
against
the DOJ for records related to Babbitt’s death. We have several
lawsuits about the January 6 issue, and just last week we released
records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26291&F=T&]
detailing how federal law enforcement knew a large crowd would be
present at the U.S. Capitol on January 6.

DURHAM EXPOSES CLINTON CONNECTIONS BEHIND ‘STEELE DOSSIER’ SMEAR

The Russia collusion myth cooked up by the Hillary Clinton campaign in
2016 and enthusiastically picked up and maliciously used by the DOJ,
FBI and State Department was perhaps the largest political scandal
ever in our history. We have never stopped our efforts to expose it,
and now Special Counsel John Durham is lending a hand in getting to
the truth. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, has the
new details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26293&F=T&]
in our _Investigative Bulletin_.

> Special Counsel John Durham continues his steady march to the truth
> about the Russia mess—the sensational allegations of Trump
> “collusion” with Russia that disrupted and nearly derailed the
> Trump presidency. Last month, we reported
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26035&F=T&]
on
> the Durham indictment of Clinton campaign adviser Michael Sussman
> for lying to the FBI about attempts to link Trump to a
> Kremlin-connected bank. Last week, Durham struck again, exposing the
> Clinton connections behind the notorious Steele Dossier—the
> compendium of anonymous smears, supposedly from Russian sources,
> that electrified the media and the liberal-left mob.

> The new indictment is an important step, but critical questions
> remain about the involvement of senior Obama administration
> officials and government agencies—mainly the Justice Department
> and the FBI—in the years-long attack on Trump.

> On Thursday, Durham indicted Russian affairs analyst Igor Danchenko
> on five counts of lying to the FBI about sources he used in
> compiling information for the Steele Dossier. Danchenko was a key
> source for Christopher Steele, the former British intelligence agent
> hired by Clinton allies to dig up dirt on Trump. Danchenko, the
> indictment notes, collected “the information that ultimately
> formed the core of the allegations” in the Steele Dossier.

> One key source for Danchenko “was a long-time participant in
> Democratic Party politics” and “later an executive at a U.S.
> public relations firm,” identified in the charging document as
> “PR Executive 1.” The Associated Press later confirmed that
> “PR Executive 1” is Chuck Dolan
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26284&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9uZXdzYmluZGluZy5jb20vbmV3cy9jb25maXJtZWQtcHItZXhlY3V0aXZlLTEtaW4tZHVyaGFtLWluZGljdG1lbnQtZG9jcy1pcy1jaGFybGVzLWRvbGFuLWpyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==],
> a former director of the Democratic Governors Association and an
> adviser to Hillary Clinton in both of her presidential campaigns.

> Danchenko and Dolan were in business together, but the Russia
> analyst repeatedly lied to the FBI when asked about Dolan, claiming
> at one point that Dolan would not “be in any way involved” with
> the Steele Dossier allegations. The lies were important, the
> indictment says, because Dolan’s “role as a contributor of
> information to [the Steele Dossier reports] was highly relevant and
> material to the FBI’s evaluation of those reports” not least
> because Dolan “maintained historical and ongoing involvement in
> Democratic politics.”

> The indictment suggests that Dolan may have been the figure behind
> the notorious Steele Dossier claim that Trump consorted with
> prostitutes at the Moscow Hotel and urinated on a bed in the
> Presidential Suite where the Obamas once stayed. Dolan, the
> indictment says, stayed at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016, receiving
> a tour of the hotel, including the Presidential Suite, from the
> general manager and others. The indictment notes that “references
> to the Moscow Hotel, the Presidential Suite, and a Moscow Hotel
> manager” would appear in the Steele Dossier. Danchenko would later
> claim that he stayed at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016 and cite in
> the Steele Dossier “a senior (western) manager of the staff at the
> hotel” as one of the sources for the Trump allegation. But
> Danchenko did not in fact stay at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016, the
> indictment notes.

> In another important development, the indictment reveals that the
> Russia analyst repeatedly lied about an anonymous call from someone
> he believed to be the president of the Russian-American Chamber of
> Commerce. The person, the Steele Dossier reported, spoke of a
> “well-developed conspiracy of cooperation” between the Trump
> campaign and Russian figures. This is a serious charge. The
> indictment notes that the claim of a “conspiracy of cooperation”
> in the Steele Report “would ultimately underpin” four Foreign
> Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA) warrants targeting a Trump
> campaign adviser. Durham does not name the figure, but news reports
> identify him as Trump adviser Carter Page.

> The allegations about the call from the Chamber of Commerce
> president, the indictment notes, “were highly material to the
> FBI” because they “formed the basis of a [Steele Dossier] report
> that, in turn, underpinned the aforementioned four FISA applications
> targeting a U.S. citizen...the allegations...played a key role in
> the FBI’s investigative decisions and in sworn representations
> that the FBI made to the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court
> throughout the relevant time period.”

> Close followers of the Russia scandal will recognize that Durham is
> teeing up a question of enormous consequence: why was the FBI
> relying on Christopher Steele for critical investigative and legal
> decisions? Any competent investigator would immediately have
> recognized Steele as damaged goods.

> By October 2016—the month of the first FISA warrant
> application—warnings were circulating inside government circles
> about Steele’s reliability and bias. Months earlier, in summer
> 2016, according to reporting by John Solomon
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26285&F=T&],
> a senior Justice Department official warned other officials at
> Justice and the FBI that Steele’s “work was opposition research
> connected to Hillary Clinton’s campaign.” Judicial
> Watch obtained FBI documents
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=14960&F=T&]
under
> the Freedom of Information Act revealing that in July 2016,
> then-Associate Deputy Attorney General Bruce Ohr admitted in an FBI
> interview that information on “Trump’s ties to Russia were
> going to the Clinton campaign, Jon Winer at the U.S. State
> Department and the FBI.”

> The documents revealed that Ohr was involved in efforts at the
> Justice Department, FBI, and State Department to dig up dirt on
> Trump. “The FISA courts weren’t informed of this corrupted
> process when they were asked to approve and reapprove extraordinary
> spy warrants targeting President Trump,” noted Judicial Watch
> President Tom Fitton. Ohr was removed from his post in December
> 2017.

> Steele himself was no stranger to the FBI. Justice Department
> Inspector General Michael Horowitz noted that Steele was a
> confidential source for the FBI on matters unrelated to American
> politics from 2013 to 2016 and was paid about $95,000 for his
> services. In 2010, Steele reportedly began providing information to
> the FBI about corruption and doping at the World Cup soccer
> tournament. In 2015, according to a timeline
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26294&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3Jhc3NsZXkuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9pbW8vbWVkaWEvZG9jL0NGSCUyNTIwVGltZWxpbmUlMjUyMHclMjUyMFVwZGF0ZXMlMjUyMDIwMjAxMjAzJTI1MjAoRklOQUwpLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
compiled
> by a Senate Homeland Security Committee investigation, an FBI report
> raised questions about Steele’s contacts with Russian oligarchs,
> calling it “unusual” and recommending a review.

> The lies of the Steele Report and Democratic Party disinformation
> operatives had broad consequences, deceiving the courts and sending
> the media and Congress and even a special counsel, Robert Mueller,
> into damaging and often reckless attempts to make something,
> anything, stick against a president they loathed. How far up the
> ladder did it go? What roles did senior Obama Administration
> officials play in the effort? What role did the Justice Department
> and the FBI play? It’s no exaggeration to say that the last, best
> bet for getting at the whole truth about the Russia mess now rests
> with one man: John Durham.

> Read the Danchenko indictment here
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26287&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2RhbmNoZW5rby1pbmRpY3RtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==].

U.S. TO SPEND $200 MILLION MORE FOR ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT MINOR SHELTERS

It seems the Biden Administration is operating the border under an
“if you build it, they will come” strategy. Millions of your tax
dollars are going to accommodate the tidal wave of people entering
this country, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26295&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdS1zLXRvLXNwZW5kLWFub3RoZXItMjAwLW1pbGxpb24tZm9yLW1vcmUtaWxsZWdhbC1pbW1pZ3JhbnQtbWlub3Itc2hlbHRlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTEzMDIzMjIw].

> Months after disbursing more than $65 million for extra shelters to
> accommodate the never-ending influx of illegal immigrant minors, the
> Biden administration is quietly allocating hundreds of millions more
> for additional facilities. The money is flowing through the Office
> of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the
> Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) charged with providing
> care to illegal aliens under the age of 18, classified by the
> government as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). HHS funds and
> oversees around 170 state-licensed care facilities to house the
> young migrants when they arrive from foreign countries south of the
> border and it simply is not enough.

> As of the end of October there are approximately 10,680 UAC in ORR
> care, according to the latest government figures
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=22226&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGhzLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL3VhYy1wcm9ncmFtLWZhY3Qtc2hlZXQucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMTEzMDIzMjIw].
> It marks a sharp increase from 4,020 in February. American taxpayers
> provide the young migrants with an array of services including
> classroom education, mental and medical health care, legal counsel,
> and a variety of recreational activities. Uncle Sam also spends
> millions to furnish many of the illegal aliens with services after
> they are released from U.S. custody, especially those considered to
> be “at risk” or display “special needs.” Most UAC in U.S.
> custody are not children but rather young adults or adolescents. In
> fact, 72% are 15 to 17 years old and 68% are boys. The majority are
> from Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras.

> Around six months ago the Biden administration gave $65,366,800 to
> seven groups throughout the country that will supply more housing
> for UAC. “ORR has been identifying additional permanent capacity
> to provide shelter for recent increases in apprehensions of
> Unaccompanied Children (UC) at the Southwest Border,” according to
> the grant announcement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26296&F=T&]
published
> in the Federal Register. “The addition of permanent capacity is a
> prudent step to ensure that ORR is able to meet its responsibility,
> by law, to provide shelter and appropriate services for UC referred
> to its care by the Department of Homeland Security.” The biggest
> chunk of money—$27,767,725—went to the Lutheran Immigration and
> Refugee Service
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26297&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlycy5vcmcvbWlzc2lvbi1hbmQtdmlzaW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
(LIRS),
> a faith-based nonprofit that works to embrace and empower all
> migrants and refugees. The second largest
> allocation—$14,135,642—filled the coffers of a business
> (Baptiste Group) that was stripped of its license
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26298&F=T&]
in
> Tennessee after three employees were charged with sexual battery
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26299&F=T&]
at
> one of its government-funded facilities in Chattanooga. The rest was
> divided between Bethany Christian Service ($7,018,576), Child Crisis
> ($5,780,118), Catholic Guardian Services ($5,183,433) and Center for
> Family Services ($1,665,980). An additional $3.8 million flowed to a
> LIRS branch called Safe Release Expansion
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26300&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlycy5vcmcvc2FmZS1yZWxlYXNlLXBhcnRuZXJzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTExMzAyMzIyMA==]
that gives illegal
> immigrant minors services after they are released.

> Less than a week ago, the administration posted another grant
> announcement
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26301&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZ3JhbnRzLmdvdi93ZWIvZ3JhbnRzL3ZpZXctb3Bwb3J0dW5pdHkuaHRtbD9vcHBJZD0zMzYyOTEmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTExMTMwMjMyMjA=]
that
> discloses the government will spend an additional $200 million to
> create more housing for the deluge of UAC that appears to have no
> end in sight. The document reveals that the “estimated total
> program funding” is an astounding $840 million. HHS writes that
> the new allotment is for “residential (shelter and/or transitional
> foster care) services” for UAC. “ORR is publishing this Standing
> Notice of Funding Opportunity (SNOFO) to seek shelter care
> providers, including group homes and transitional foster care,”
> according to the agency. Eligibility is unrestricted to receive a
> grant and even nonprofits that do not have official 501(c)(3)
> status with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and for-profit
> organizations as well as small businesses are encouraged to apply
> for a piece of the pie. Public housing authorities, private
> institutions of higher education and “others” are also eligible,
> the latest announcement says.

> As if it weren’t bad enough that American taxpayers are getting
> stuck with the exorbitant tab of caring for the young illegal
> aliens, many have joined criminal enterprises after getting settled
> into the country. Back in 2014 Judicial Watch reported
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=22228&F=T&]
that
> the nation’s most violent street gangs—including Mara
> Salvatrucha (MS-13)—actively recruit new members at U.S. shelters
> housing UAC. The Texas Department of Public Safety
> subsequently revealed
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=26302&F=T&]
the
> MS-13 is a top tier gang thanks to the influx of illegal alien gang
> members that have crossed into the state. A few years ago, Judicial
> Watch obtained HHS documents
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57109&L=22839&F=T&]
that
> show UAC processed during the Obama administration included violent

Until next week ...

clean_body: Clinton Connections Behind ‘Steele Dossier’ Smear Coming to Light [WEEKLY UPDATE] New Ashli Babbitt Audio, Video, and Photos from DC Police [=] DC POLICE RELEASE AUDIO, VIDEO, PHOTOS IN ASHLI BABBITT KILLING Piece by piece we’re putting together a clearer picture of the unnecessary shooting death of Ashli Babbitt on January 6, 2021, in the U.S. Capitol Building. Our suspicion about the tragic affair is heightened by the government’s recalcitrance in releasing the information it has. This week we received multiple audio, visual and photo records from the DC Metropolitan Police Department about death at the hands of a Capitol Police officer. The records include a cell phone video [==] of the shooting and an audio [==] of a brief police interview of the shooter, Lt. Michael Byrd. We obtained the material through a May 2021 FOIA lawsuit [==] filed after DC officials failed to respond to two April, 2021 FOIA requests to the Metropolitan Police Department and the Office of the Chief Medical Examiner for records related to Babbitt’s death (Judicial Watch v. The District of Columbia [] (No. 2021 CA 001710 B)). Babbitt was shot and killed as she climbed through a broken interior window in the United States Capitol. She was unarmed, and a 14-year Air Force veteran. The identity of the shooter was kept secret by Congress as well as federal and local authorities for eight months until U.S. Capitol Police officer Michael Byrd went public to try to defend his killing of Babbitt. The new records include a new cell phone video, edited by the DC police, that depicts police reacting to the shooting. Also included among the records is an audio recording [==] of an interview of Lt. Michael Byrd by the DC Metropolitan Police on January 6, 2021. The voices in Byrd’s and other witness interview audio recordings are all digitally altered to try to hide identities. The documents also include photos [] of the area where Babbitt was killed and DC police photographs of Lt. Byrd, his hands, and his gun. The photos also include pictures of a folding knife reportedly found in Babbitt’s pocket. Other audio interviews of witnesses provide first-hand accounts of the shooting. Last month, also as a result of this lawsuit, we released records [=] from the DC Police about the shooting death of Babbitt, showing that multiple officers claimed they didn’t see a weapon in Babbitt’s hand before Byrd shot her, and Byrd was visibly distraught afterward. One officer attested that he didn’t hear any verbal commands before Byrd shot Babbitt. The new records include audio recordings of these witness interviews. The records also include internal communications about Byrd’s case and a crime scene examination report. These recordings and photos provide dramatic, first-hand evidence that the shooting death of Ashli Babbitt was unjustified. It is disturbing that neither the Pelosi Congress not the Biden/Garland DOJ took no action over this needless death. We also filed a FOIA lawsuit [=] against the DOJ for records related to Babbitt’s death. We have several lawsuits about the January 6 issue, and just last week we released records [] detailing how federal law enforcement knew a large crowd would be present at the U.S. Capitol on January 6. DURHAM EXPOSES CLINTON CONNECTIONS BEHIND ‘STEELE DOSSIER’ SMEAR The Russia collusion myth cooked up by the Hillary Clinton campaign in 2016 and enthusiastically picked up and maliciously used by the DOJ, FBI and State Department was perhaps the largest political scandal ever in our history. We have never stopped our efforts to expose it, and now Special Counsel John Durham is lending a hand in getting to the truth. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, has the new details [==] in our Investigative Bulletin. Special Counsel John Durham continues his steady march to the truth about the Russia mess—the sensational allegations of Trump “collusion” with Russia that disrupted and nearly derailed the Trump presidency. Last month, we reported [] on the Durham indictment of Clinton campaign adviser Michael Sussman for lying to the FBI about attempts to link Trump to a Kremlin-connected bank. Last week, Durham struck again, exposing the Clinton connections behind the notorious Steele Dossier—the compendium of anonymous smears, supposedly from Russian sources, that electrified the media and the liberal-left mob. The new indictment is an important step, but critical questions remain about the involvement of senior Obama administration officials and government agencies—mainly the Justice Department and the FBI—in the years-long attack on Trump. On Thursday, Durham indicted Russian affairs analyst Igor Danchenko on five counts of lying to the FBI about sources he used in compiling information for the Steele Dossier. Danchenko was a key source for Christopher Steele, the former British intelligence agent hired by Clinton allies to dig up dirt on Trump. Danchenko, the indictment notes, collected “the information that ultimately formed the core of the allegations” in the Steele Dossier. One key source for Danchenko “was a long-time participant in Democratic Party politics” and “later an executive at a U.S. public relations firm,” identified in the charging document as “PR Executive 1.” The Associated Press later confirmed that “PR Executive 1” is Chuck Dolan [==], a former director of the Democratic Governors Association and an adviser to Hillary Clinton in both of her presidential campaigns. Danchenko and Dolan were in business together, but the Russia analyst repeatedly lied to the FBI when asked about Dolan, claiming at one point that Dolan would not “be in any way involved” with the Steele Dossier allegations. The lies were important, the indictment says, because Dolan’s “role as a contributor of information to [the Steele Dossier reports] was highly relevant and material to the FBI’s evaluation of those reports” not least because Dolan “maintained historical and ongoing involvement in Democratic politics.” The indictment suggests that Dolan may have been the figure behind the notorious Steele Dossier claim that Trump consorted with prostitutes at the Moscow Hotel and urinated on a bed in the Presidential Suite where the Obamas once stayed. Dolan, the indictment says, stayed at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016, receiving a tour of the hotel, including the Presidential Suite, from the general manager and others. The indictment notes that “references to the Moscow Hotel, the Presidential Suite, and a Moscow Hotel manager” would appear in the Steele Dossier. Danchenko would later claim that he stayed at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016 and cite in the Steele Dossier “a senior (western) manager of the staff at the hotel” as one of the sources for the Trump allegation. But Danchenko did not in fact stay at the Moscow Hotel in June 2016, the indictment notes. In another important development, the indictment reveals that the Russia analyst repeatedly lied about an anonymous call from someone he believed to be the president of the Russian-American Chamber of Commerce. The person, the Steele Dossier reported, spoke of a “well-developed conspiracy of cooperation” between the Trump campaign and Russian figures. This is a serious charge. The indictment notes that the claim of a “conspiracy of cooperation” in the Steele Report “would ultimately underpin” four Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA) warrants targeting a Trump campaign adviser. Durham does not name the figure, but news reports identify him as Trump adviser Carter Page. The allegations about the call from the Chamber of Commerce president, the indictment notes, “were highly material to the FBI” because they “formed the basis of a [Steele Dossier] report that, in turn, underpinned the aforementioned four FISA applications targeting a U.S. citizen...the allegations...played a key role in the FBI’s investigative decisions and in sworn representations that the FBI made to the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Court throughout the relevant time period.” Close followers of the Russia scandal will recognize that Durham is teeing up a question of enormous consequence: why was the FBI relying on Christopher Steele for critical investigative and legal decisions? Any competent investigator would immediately have recognized Steele as damaged goods. By October 2016—the month of the first FISA warrant application—warnings were circulating inside government circles about Steele’s reliability and bias. Months earlier, in summer 2016, according to reporting by John Solomon [=], a senior Justice Department official warned other officials at Justice and the FBI that Steele’s “work was opposition research connected to Hillary Clinton’s campaign.” Judicial Watch obtained FBI documents [] under the Freedom of Information Act revealing that in July 2016, then-Associate Deputy Attorney General Bruce Ohr admitted in an FBI interview that information on “Trump’s ties to Russia were going to the Clinton campaign, Jon Winer at the U.S. State Department and the FBI.” The documents revealed that Ohr was involved in efforts at the Justice Department, FBI, and State Department to dig up dirt on Trump. “The FISA courts weren’t informed of this corrupted process when they were asked to approve and reapprove extraordinary spy warrants targeting President Trump,” noted Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. Ohr was removed from his post in December 2017. Steele himself was no stranger to the FBI. Justice Department Inspector General Michael Horowitz noted that Steele was a confidential source for the FBI on matters unrelated to American politics from 2013 to 2016 and was paid about $95,000 for his services. In 2010, Steele reportedly began providing information to the FBI about corruption and doping at the World Cup soccer tournament. In 2015, according to a timeline [==] compiled by a Senate Homeland Security Committee investigation, an FBI report raised questions about Steele’s contacts with Russian oligarchs, calling it “unusual” and recommending a review. The lies of the Steele Report and Democratic Party disinformation operatives had broad consequences, deceiving the courts and sending the media and Congress and even a special counsel, Robert Mueller, into damaging and often reckless attempts to make something, anything, stick against a president they loathed. How far up the ladder did it go? What roles did senior Obama Administration officials play in the effort? What role did the Justice Department and the FBI play? It’s no exaggeration to say that the last, best bet for getting at the whole truth about the Russia mess now rests with one man: John Durham. Read the Danchenko indictment here [==]. U.S. TO SPEND $200 MILLION MORE FOR ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT MINOR SHELTERS It seems the Biden Administration is operating the border under an “if you build it, they will come” strategy. Millions of your tax dollars are going to accommodate the tidal wave of people entering this country, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Months after disbursing more than $65 million for extra shelters to accommodate the never-ending influx of illegal immigrant minors, the Biden administration is quietly allocating hundreds of millions more for additional facilities. The money is flowing through the Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR), a well-funded branch of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) charged with providing care to illegal aliens under the age of 18, classified by the government as Unaccompanied Alien Children (UAC). HHS funds and oversees around 170 state-licensed care facilities to house the young migrants when they arrive from foreign countries south of the border and it simply is not enough. As of the end of October there are approximately 10,680 UAC in ORR care, according to the latest government figures []. It marks a sharp increase from 4,020 in February. American taxpayers provide the young migrants with an array of services including classroom education, mental and medical health care, legal counsel, and a variety of recreational activities. Uncle Sam also spends millions to furnish many of the illegal aliens with services after they are released from U.S. custody, especially those considered to be “at risk” or display “special needs.” Most UAC in U.S. custody are not children but rather young adults or adolescents. In fact, 72% are 15 to 17 years old and 68% are boys. The majority are from Guatemala, El Salvador, and Honduras. Around six months ago the Biden administration gave $65,366,800 to seven groups throughout the country that will supply more housing for UAC. “ORR has been identifying additional permanent capacity to provide shelter for recent increases in apprehensions of Unaccompanied Children (UC) at the Southwest Border,” according to the grant announcement [==] published in the Federal Register. “The addition of permanent capacity is a prudent step to ensure that ORR is able to meet its responsibility, by law, to provide shelter and appropriate services for UC referred to its care by the Department of Homeland Security.” The biggest chunk of money—$27,767,725—went to the Lutheran Immigration and Refugee Service [==] (LIRS), a faith-based nonprofit that works to embrace and empower all migrants and refugees. The second largest allocation—$14,135,642—filled the coffers of a business (Baptiste Group) that was stripped of its license [=] in Tennessee after three employees were charged with sexual battery [] at one of its government-funded facilities in Chattanooga. The rest was divided between Bethany Christian Service ($7,018,576), Child Crisis ($5,780,118), Catholic Guardian Services ($5,183,433) and Center for Family Services ($1,665,980). An additional $3.8 million flowed to a LIRS branch called Safe Release Expansion [==] that gives illegal immigrant minors services after they are released. Less than a week ago, the administration posted another grant announcement [=] that discloses the government will spend an additional $200 million to create more housing for the deluge of UAC that appears to have no end in sight. The document reveals that the “estimated total program funding” is an astounding $840 million. HHS writes that the new allotment is for “residential (shelter and/or transitional foster care) services” for UAC. “ORR is publishing this Standing Notice of Funding Opportunity (SNOFO) to seek shelter care providers, including group homes and transitional foster care,” according to the agency. Eligibility is unrestricted to receive a grant and even nonprofits that do not have official 501(c)(3) status with the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and for-profit organizations as well as small businesses are encouraged to apply for a piece of the pie. Public housing authorities, private institutions of higher education and “others” are also eligible, the latest announcement says. As if it weren’t bad enough that American taxpayers are getting stuck with the exorbitant tab of caring for the young illegal aliens, many have joined criminal enterprises after getting settled into the country. Back in 2014 Judicial Watch reported [==] that the nation’s most violent street gangs—including Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13)—actively recruit new members at U.S. shelters housing UAC. The Texas Department of Public Safety subsequently revealed [] the MS-13 is a top tier gang thanks to the influx of illegal alien gang members that have crossed into the state. A few years ago, Judicial Watch obtained HHS documents [=] that show UAC processed during the Obama administration included violent criminals. Obtained under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA), the files include 1,000 “Significant Incident Reports” showing that UAC were admitted murderers, rapists, prostitutes, drug smugglers, and human traffickers. Until next week ... [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753983:6ZRdZ_2BN:m:1:3253819041:6485DC11774FC83E1A9DCC8C17DF6259:r)
Please choose one of the following options:

---|---
I know you're busy so I'll wrap this up, but I really hope you'll respond.
I'll be going over our final results in about 10 minutes. [**Can I be on the lookout for your answer?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58753983:6ZRdZ_2BN:m:1:3253819041:6485DC11774FC83E1A9DCC8C17DF6259:r)
Thanks in advance for your quick response.
\-- Olivia

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: Kyle needs YOUR help, Peter
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58754266:JfDAX_2DN:m:1:3253819041:E69993D08ED3B26DA19F977241DDE309:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident, but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58754266:JfDAX_2DN:m:1:3253819041:E69993D08ED3B26DA19F977241DDE309:r)**
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58754266:JfDAX_2DN:m:1:3253819041:E69993D08ED3B26DA19F977241DDE309:r)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58754266:JfDAX_2DN:m:1:3253819041:E69993D08ED3B26DA19F977241DDE309:r)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58754266:JfDAX_2DN:m:1:3253819041:E69993D08ED3B26DA19F977241DDE309:r)

name: American Update
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8006%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=0susOHU3OWjRqKSSzXNriw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b%2bMo5Qs4VT%2bzMrnf9ey4lw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cn%2faTEDnFtVKAK9bpbYa2g&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWEBr7%2f%2bmK0MHqag9%2fN0ag&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5WTkcGg4fBNf43uKJNLi7g&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gWEBr7%2f%2bmK0MHqag9%2fN0ag&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c17346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KN%2fTwE33qHuymye3Bmg%2bZw&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

body:
Hey Peter,
My name is Olivia. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**
[**If you _are_ receiving this important Republican communication, could you spare a moment to respond right away?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58755078:6chV__2gN:m:1:3298722022:C3C82B9B7951D67991BE7A9A46896B7F:r)

\-- Olivia

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your course is ready
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqeopec5ihmpheg3d6dsl7jftlprokrmg70odal8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9l4lg512p54qa6d94qffjdsc6anqk3q00fgp468_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmke00v8g5sehtqrct390ai1pvq9p23asclg7bgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkd21e3qdg4qtupgmtqqnqdcepk764uco0t38le0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi6csgilq57l0ue5qt4sl8kfcbdt7tr12e5gtis8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhi32assadegkid5q5j0mit2qbgsh8uqm9es5um0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4raa8jmamg7pufg99b3shaqe0knaiv6b1t6biag_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7pesif9jdrq7sn0f99sqbdbqrlagf2veklb7l0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmd9gliodod899252p6dt1sapg5uliv5o33130qo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g68pj4c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodlep0n5adg6nunqo8e378h0rn6s7aekej8e4ao_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjeurj0thmemp79crhmiob7d3ietge4odgsdgm0tbhceqmfd366mpncs7162qmeduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75dj66pjj6oj7mthmcdb0m9h3csh5u)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2o03t4j9q3o8u2om5gbscbssc4oethmnqtcnioo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7q2f1io7rtq444anudrgiouv0ramet9ub5887u0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk3q4bks586r64alf8t5egi92jhn5setq6b4gki8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrp6n99vuudhmlodf6eq3bqrn8htc7ecmti5s3k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkduf23k57qn9242smfa6q9mh7dpjmam88hrtsj8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z991k05atbmenhadhgkteef9dmb26pimh76opjdg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7r5891n7binq04a571r1lgghl2rr0vq39mmd6f0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrf4ss9run1antcg7j02dp4olca3h3aek62b7to_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmeq9u5u5folsc95rnojciee8jarhdsanh2ic0io_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq37ihcbkk468g6l3qh6uhr5tcgnj2vmiakdvqa0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76c5h2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: ICYMI News
subject: A bright light during dark hours
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, cons
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgburmij2p40kfj6bsolms8uovikbr1g684ms5tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb1eqj116p8ln9qhehd5u0kab2onauqpm5v57bf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaevik65bd4m26cmotkvkc0qrqcieqgl7rpiuqgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4puh5tjs617sdh38mvg8ufp2aq015m7pnedmvlo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlks965kv282s4a83f9oruhjtr5o8dcdd4uquruo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znu45fep196k71pcs2gon303406okfi26177qi5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhpms771i67h71mmqlmi9l8bhu1sr12ikj45bkk8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfeddfc2ok6895p6cs0pi55hqqo5o5vp1n1tnprg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf1d5nmhp75cplcdib8c3hm4pnctpgecp66dr2cerr8ojgsoqb9d3lctgeacrmc1h238h1e8he4933cphm1o31c3j6aoh5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd9amrckvmojajsufrp7b6e4akucm367sv9970b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3g62o76clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Mike Pompeo (iPhone)
subject: My personal email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | Secretary of State Mike Pompeo here. My team gave me your email and asked me to reach out to you specifically.

We are now quickly approaching our first fundraising deadline since the BIG Republican victories, and all eyes are watching to see if we can meet our goal. We are still coming up $17,750 short, but I know we can close the gap if enough patriotic Americans chip in whatever they can.

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda_ \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That's made me some enemies, and they are all hoping we fail to meet our goal.

You can **[CLICK HERE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58755967:J4Tdq_21N:m:1:3298722022:0D893C414F3478B47035D1D27A46092E:r "CLICK HERE")** to rush an emergency donation right now. No matter how large or small, every dollar will go a long way toward closing the gap and putting us over the top.

Nothing will make Joe Biden, Kamala Harris and Nancy Pelosi more upset than seeing our America First team exceed our goal. _But to do that, I need your help._

Please **[rush a $25 donation](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58755967:J4Tdq_21N:m:1:3298722022:0D893C414F3478B47035D1D27A46092E:r "rush a
donation")** RIGHT NOW. It could be the difference in whether we win or lose.

Thanks,
\- Mike

(sent from iPhone)

clean_body: | | | | | Secretary of State Mike Pompeo here. My team gave me your email and asked me to reach out to you specifically. We are now quickly approaching our first fundraising deadline since the BIG Republican victories, and all eyes are watching to see if we can meet our goal. We are still coming up $17,750 short, but I know we can close the gap if enough patriotic Americans chip in whatever they can. My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda \- from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again. That's made me some enemies, and they are all hoping we fail to meet our goal. You can "CLICK HERE" to rush an emergency donation right now. No matter how large or small, every dollar will go a long way toward closing the gap and putting us over the top. Nothing will make Joe Biden, Kamala Harris and Nancy Pelosi more upset than seeing our America First team exceed our goal. But to do that, I need your help. Please "rush a donation" RIGHT NOW. It could be the difference in whether we win or lose. Thanks, \- Mike (sent from iPhone) | | Help Champion American Values: Text CHAMPION to 29910 Make sure you never miss an update from Mike Pompeo and CAVPAC! body:
