name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs. We must act.
body:
I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. After nearly 20 years of decorated se
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkukqcb6oqqqlla1jss0qj676325nk68stuci668_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf7d1k6lgj4ddl61gr2tli6errbcpjm4om4sr7m1rrap5mm6obdc3ks6q76s31curt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0ear6cdj0mdgmfdr1copb1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cphm1oj2c3i69oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd7bgi6quja1u1qpb3g1q3b8mbqtdsaa2hr1rh6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3h64o74cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident – but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za0op7pj05qggfgs2ascd49133u9i047n659ur6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3h64o74cjh2bs)**
|
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1iim19ali3gnn7ju7ola1qjv55gjtrqek6bm860_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3h64o74cjh2bs)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h5cbrdvci20lc0705gc5g8o8anl0ap0mo8jk4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3h64o74cjh2bs)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---

Steadfast, Eddie Gallagher Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.) | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. subject: I served in Iraq, and I'll tell it like it is.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38597588/316170391/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDEwZGNiMy1hNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVnoFQyR-jxTat266Nm23uQg6JmD8BUE3miYeCiG1Vg=)
Friend --

I'm a combat veteran who served two tours in Iraq. I enlisted when I was 19, and by age 22, I had earned my Combat Infantry Badge and survived multiple IED and mortar attacks.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38597589/316170392/-209993060?refcode=em-111321-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDEwZGNiMy1hNDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pVnoFQyR-jxTat266Nm23uQg6JmD8BUE3miYeCiG1Vg=)
One lesson (among many) I learned in the military is that our country has been ill-served by a Congress full of armchair generals and think-tank strategists. Those folks are responsible for squandering billions of dollars and countless lives on interventions overseas.

It's easy to beat the war drum when your life is not on the line. But those who serve know best that our men and women must be used sparingly and decisively -- and only when it means protecting our country. It seems that notion is sorely lacking in Congress.

**Take my opponent Doug LaMalfa for example. He's never worn the uniform, but even now he won't hesitate to fan the flames and play politics when it comes to our military. It's irresponsible, and there's no room for it in Congress.**

We need to elect more people who served in the military and understand the stakes. That's why I'm stepping up to run, and it's why I need your help:

**[We fell a bit short of our end-of-week fundraising goal, and need some help catching up if we're going to unseat Doug LaMalfa. The month is off to a good start, but they need to raise $10,000 by Monday in order to stay on track to hit their goal. = Since Democrats regained control of the Senate, we’ve been moving quickly to pass legislation to help Americans across the country. And it’s paying off, big time! Democrats just passed the largest single infrastructure investment in American history. But I’ve seen some scary polls recently that should set off alarm bells for Democrats. If we’re not able to turn the tide in some states, we could find ourselves looking at Mitch McConnell in the majority when the Senate reconvenes after the upcoming midterms. So back to the part where you can help. Defend the Senate has a big fundraising goal to hit this month. If we can help them out by raising $10,000 by Monday they’ll be well positioned to elect Democrats and defend our Senate majority next year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Democrats should be proud of the work we’ve done this year to improve people’s lives. The hard work and sweat we put in now will make all of the difference come this time next year. So let’s keep up the hard work! James Carville Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

subject: They want to call ME a racist!

body:
|
---
| | | Dear Peter,

The radical liberals are losing their minds that the first Woman elected to the office of Lt. Governor is a Black Republican.

Their derangement has gone so far that **THEY WANT TO CALL ME A RACIST!**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758591:6lempx2N_:m:1:3253819041:342FCA4B9F50B7D24F62A34A7CC25FCE:r)
---

The radical liberals can say whatever they want, but it's obvious they are afraid that a Black Republican Woman will destroy their narrative that America and the Republican Party are fundamentally Racist.

---
| | [HELP STATE REPUBLICANS SHOW THE LIBERALS WHAT THE GOP IS REALLY ABOUT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758591:6lempx2N_:m:1:3253819041:342FCA4B9F50B7D24F62A34A7CC25FCE:r)
---

Our ticket was the most diverse in Virginia history, and we brought a sweeping Republican victory to Virginia, but we can't stop now.

We all have to stand together and show the left that we will not sit idly by as they spread their lies and call us racists.

**[I'm asking you to please stand with state Republicans and reject the left's lies about us. enormous help in spreading our message.")**

I know you won't stand by as they call you and me racists.

Thank you for all your support,

Lieutenant Governor-Elect Winsome Earle Sears

name: Kevin Schilling, Political Director
subject: I can hardly keep up with Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

When I say Derek is a dedicated public servant: I _really_ mean it. I'm sure a lot of other campaign staffers tell you how great their boss is, but I'm willing to bet that very few of them work for elected officials as committed to their constituents as Derek is.

**As Derek 's political director, I honestly have a hard time keeping up! Here's just a few of the ways Derek's kept himself busy working for you and your family these past few months:**

He voted to pass the bipartisan infrastructure package, helped introduce legislation to protect, improve, and extend Social Security benefits, and even went on _Fox News_ to champion President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda.

**And that 's not all!** Derek is pushing for affordable housing, leading efforts to reform and strengthen our democracy, advocating for our local economies, and criss-crossing across the district to hear directly from supporters like you.

Derek embodies the best of public service and brings our voices and priorities with him to Washington, D.C.

**But here 's the problem:** the Congressional elections are less than a year away, and historically members of Congress in the President's party (that's us) have the hardest time winning re-election.

That means we need to start ramping up our efforts to build a winning campaign NOW to re-elect Derek next year. That's where you come in, Peter:

**[We're facing our November mid-month deadline on Monday, and we've set a goal to get 300 grassroots donors to chip in before then. Can we count on you to be one of them? Help us build on the momentum and reach our goal by rushing a donation to Derek before the deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/biurgQkaDt7oYwjFm-hGN1_5bwVUmjMnM9sQoxHWjwE=/CmI4M2jaJ47--dh8v-8VL0pdebwxcZzycTaVuwl3M1Y=?refcode=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

name: Jake Evans
subject: Reminder: Stop Stacey Abrams, SAVE Election Integrity!
body:
I have some very serious news...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,
I have some very serious news about the future of our state.
Stacey Abrams and her team of far left socialists are doing everything they can to keep socialist Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District.
They're pouring MILLIONS of dollars into this race because they know lefty Lucy supports dangerous election bills like HR1 and HR4.
If Stacey Abrams and Lucy McBath get their way, our elections will be taken over by the corrupt Washington, DC Swamp.
I am running as a bold and unafraid conservative trailblazer who will stand up to the left's attempts to weaken our elections and expose Georgia to fraud.
[Will you DONATE $15, $25, $50, or more TODAY to help my campaign STOP far left socialists like Lucy McBath and Stacey Abrams from permanently destroying Georgia's election integrity?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oXusIC9nUnqr-W3_pnuKEaxRR12yXyuGbuUBTXUelElAGRmGxRRxPgfVX1MHRcbmm44D_1U1J-pQNIJ78-D8njr02yuTfZsKVAdh1EzZkMT7q7e-YhEaFvpqB1zvjpqB5sjmQotH92MV0Hj2G3jBCzV6qgm-UQMy2L4uskFn8cnNi2m6qx5btfxGioyOt65Xeq_1vgvBETw=&c=rrCa3nQnYZ4P1tCv1UAM0YJ_j0Ey4J7UdxruC6fhj1dgC2JWAqrwcw==&ch=KYbRxjAzrs9qOjlNBN_W274N7D4JImP4y9FyjrkL4FIDrsLo32wlWw==)

name: Sen. Rob Ortt
subject: Cuomo Comeback?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Andrew Cuomo is planning a run for Attorney General. Help stop him!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Vn778xVDbrBlhwvzMAyyunGSmRkVI6r_tBg0kAaTsroR6xvsO1-J-HepFy5LIsL4-hEypvwTHe7KO-D8vsvFkWucaGw-kVdUWr_MZan71h_W_eOkfxST6vSjKxxfdCrzzDiSQ48su4o4qwvUebLW1g==&c=tRBSO5Uk1AnJWb4B4Hz7bNc0oMIBUU9bT43s6RJLPbgYODMIJOvRjw==&ch=D4gm1KMrxYt5D8cqzZ2PQ_n5-OOQORrc39XEeiOlAWwdOMtl47Xs-w==)
---
Dear Friend,
It's only been a few months since Andrew Cuomo resigned in disgrace, but now the New York Post is reporting he is plotting a political comeback!
Armed with more than $18 million in his campaign war chest, Andrew Cuomo is considering a run for New York State Attorney General.
---
---
This is exactly why I called on Albany Democrats to IMPEACH our corrupt former Governor, to prevent him from running for political office again.
Instead, they let him off the hook and now he's coming back to exact political revenge on New York.
To stop Andrew Cuomo for good we need elected leaders who have the courage to stand up to this bully. The Senate Republicans have proven they are willing to fight back on behalf of the people of New York. I need your help to strengthen our hand.
A Republican Senate Majority is the only way to truly hold Andrew Cuomo responsible and prevent him for doing more damage to our state.
With $18 million in special interest money, Andrew Cuomo will win if we don't have help...
[Please make an urgent contribution to our Senate Republican Victory fund TODAY and help us stop Andrew Cuomo for good. clean_body: Andrew Cuomo is planning a run for Attorney General. Help stop him! | | | | | | | == Dear Friend, It's only been a few months since Andrew Cuomo resigned in disgrace, but now the New York Post is reporting he is plotting a political comeback! Armed with more than $18 million in his campaign war chest, Andrew Cuomo is considering a run for New York State Attorney General. This is exactly why I called on Albany Democrats to IMPEACH our corrupt former Governor, to prevent him from running for political office again. Instead, they let him off the hook and now he's coming back to exact political revenge on New York. To stop Andrew Cuomo for good we need elected leaders who have the courage to stand up to this bully. The Senate Republicans have proven they are willing to fight back on behalf of the people of New York. I need your help to strengthen our hand. A Republican Senate Majority is the only way to truly hold Andrew Cuomo responsible and prevent him for doing more damage to our state. With $18 million in special interest money, Andrew Cuomo will win if we don't have help... == | | == | | == | | == | | | == | With your help, we will have the resources we need to defeat Andrew Cuomo and his allies in Albany. We can't save our state without you. | Thank you for your support, == | | | Rob Ortt Senate Republican Leader | | | == | | | | SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:info@robortt.com powered by

subject: BREAKING: More Fines for Marjorie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759075:676qLx2wN:m:1:3298722022:FFDE8F0203630B20AEE932FB0B9EB441:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

subject: Support freedom and liberty over Socialist Bullies
body:
For too long, the socialist Radicals have made a joke out of the People’s House.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmvPB6PASZ1wB1gBmBAT_VV9KROyi2l_Ub6zeRrGKzpJ6mz5dcFKw6NvxoJ_IS0TEHsBIFT5-KcXbrpGXVZ_K8UcqmuAYzH-H2iDFQwwRSNTz9e4W7UyLtyrulzvYg-LIgcM0P75ouKK8XIe44Zq7lKveF2kn1VaqWiW0K6J6WBV4tIPV-Qu-MmX5NYpIhed&c=XFxQelBHa0VNYSs9HEdkXKnlNJxhdQLa5Xz0NK2uEdm7JlNKPiBqFA==&ch=ZyuHIGQlcREJIDl8sKeYQ5SfwV-q_FpiHviWunN2MsEUpK1h8bDzCw==)
---
| Friend,
For too long, the Socialist Radicals have made a joke out of the People's House.
Instead of listening to the American people and focusing on real solutions, they create more crises and push Far-Left policies. Even worse, whenever the people speak out against their corrupt policies and socialist agenda...the Radical Left tries to censor them.
Our leaders are supposed to have the people's consent, but Biden and his mob of Socialists think they can silence us and continue with their big government plans.
They are wrong.
---
| | | [STAND UP TO SOCIALIST BULLIES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmvPB6PASZ1wB1gBmBAT_VV9KROyi2l_Ub6zeRrGKzpJ6mz5dcFKw6NvxoJ_IS0TEHsBIFT5-KcXbrpGXVZ_K8UcqmuAYzH-H2iDFQwwRSNTz9e4W7UyLtyrulzvYg-LIgcM0P75ouKK8XIe44Zq7lKveF2kn1VaqWiW0K6J6WBV4tIPV-Qu-MmX5NYpIhed&c=XFxQelBHa0VNYSs9HEdkXKnlNJxhdQLa5Xz0NK2uEdm7JlNKPiBqFA==&ch=ZyuHIGQlcREJIDl8sKeYQ5SfwV-q_FpiHviWunN2MsEUpK1h8bDzCw==)
---
| We will show them that the people decide their term in office, not Wall Street and Big Tech.
The voices of the people will be heard. But we need to bring a Red Wave in 2022 to put an end to the socialist agenda.
Kat has and always will fight for the America First movement, in Florida, and on Capitol Hill. She is the woman who will help secure our borders, prevent censorship, end the spending sprees, and protect your rights as an American.
However, she needs your help to make it happen. [Can Kat count on your support in her fight against the socialist bullies and put America First?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pmvPB6PASZ1wB1gBmBAT_VV9KROyi2l_Ub6zeRrGKzpJ6mz5dcFKw6NvxoJ_IS0TEHsBIFT5-KcXbrpGXVZ_K8UcqmuAYzH-H2iDFQwwRSNTz9e4W7UyLtyrulzvYg-LIgcM0P75ouKK8XIe44Zq7lKveF2kn1VaqWiW0K6J6WBV4tIPV-Qu-MmX5NYpIhed&c=XFxQelBHa0VNYSs9HEdkXKnlNJxhdQLa5Xz0NK2uEdm7JlNKPiBqFA==&ch=ZyuHIGQlcREJIDl8sKeYQ5SfwV-q_FpiHviWunN2MsEUpK1h8bDzCw==)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: More Fines for Being Free
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "Headline") Peter: I will never allow Nancy Pelosi to tell me what to do. I don't care how many times she threatens me, and I don't care how many times she fines me. I will not wear a face diaper - they do nothing to protect anyone. This, of course, forces Nancy to retire to her fainting couch in horror. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "Nancy")**_Good. Angering Nancy Pelosi is the surest sign I know how to show I am on the right track.[If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to take actions that make her FURIOUS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "If you agree, then your IMMEDIATE donation will help me continue to
take actions that make her FURIOUS.")_** I was born in America, and I am free - my freedom is my birthright. That birthright is behind every vote I take in Congress, and I will never stop fighting for freedom. Sadly, for our nation, my commitment to our freedom makes me a target for so many powerful entities. **[I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "I need to know if you are standing with those who would restrict
your life to suit their ideals or if you stand with me as I fight for our freedom.")** They HATE our freedom and our unwillingness to accept their socialist takeover. They HATED President Trump for fighting to protect it. They HATE me for continuing that work. And that HATE colors every decision they make, just as my love for America colors every decision I make to uphold our Constitution. I will not wear a mask simply because Nancy Pelosi and Anthony Fauci decreed it, and I won't stop fighting for this nation. We will make decisions about our "public safety," and we'll never allow the radical left to force their demands on us. **[Not when I have patriots like you on my team.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "Not when I have patriots like you on my team.")** Thank you. God Bless America. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58758697:JPzYAx2ZN:m:1:3253819041:A53E9AE1DE4EBF87844982A8F039D334:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: FWD: I don’t do this often

body:
Friend, did you miss my message?
|
---

body:
Vote to Stop the Madness | Fight for North Jersey | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ccd6db8a7006/casha-launches-agressive-campaign-13445363?e=ade10d3dbe)
---
| |
## Peter,

## Are we going to allow
the highest tax rates in the world?

**_Under Joe Biden's spending plan, New Jersey residents will shoulder an effective top tax rate of 63.2% - the third highest in the nation, only lower than New York and California.*_** **Join me to stop this massive tax grab.**

_I’m running for Congress to fight for North Jersey._

__**Sign the petition today**_ , let’s tell them to **STOP THE INSANITY**._ [](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=733825952a&e=ade10d3dbe)

* Tax Foundation: [Top Tax Rate on Personal Income Would Be Highest in OECD under New Build Back Better Framework](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=92a54c5399&e=ade10d3dbe)

Larry Casha
* * *

_About Larry and his campaign: Larry is the sitting Republican State Committeeman from Morris County, has served as Council President in Kinnelon Borough and as a Trustee to the County College of Morris. He has lived his entire life in New Jersey’s 11th District. He is a small business owner deeply involved in community and charitable organizations. Larry and his wife Debra dated in high school and now are law partners. They have spent their careers fighting for the forgotten residents of New Jersey who have been abandoned by Washington and Trenton bureaucrats. It is time New Jersey gets more back on every dollar in taxes we send to Washington. It is time to save our nation from Pelosi’s socialist agenda, that is supported by Mikie Sherrill, which is attempting to change the fabric of the country. This shortchanges New Jersey, driving away the very friends and neighbors with whom we grew up._

###

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Ducey?=
subject: Ducey: Biden Wins Arizona, Then Turns On It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ducey for Governor
body:
Wall Street Journal Opinion: From the border to the forests and schools, the administration is hostile to the state I lead. | |
---
| | |
---
| | | Hello,
---
| We wanted to share with you Governor Ducey's latest op-ed in the Wall Street Journal. We hope you'll take a minute to read the editorial and share it with a fellow conservative this weekend.
---
|
---
| **Biden Wins Arizona, Then Turns On It** _From the border to the forests and schools, the administration is hostile to the state I lead._ For more than two decades national Democrats spent big trying to replicate Bill Clinton’s 1996 Arizona win. After succeeding in 2020, you’d think President Biden would be working overtime to keep the state in the blue column. But less than a year into his administration, his record shows the opposite. If anything, Mr. Biden has inexplicably gone out of his way to antagonize, alienate and frustrate us here in the Grand Canyon State.

Start with the border crisis. It affects us more acutely than almost any other state. And yet—along with Afghanistan—it’s seen by many as his administration’s biggest failure. Our border towns are being overrun; our law enforcement and National Guard are stretched to the breaking point; the flow of drugs is worse than ever; and our charitable organizations can’t handle the volume of migrants.

What’s happening at the border isn’t a case of benign neglect. Criminal negligence is more like it, and Arizonans are paying a huge price.

Continue with education. During the pandemic we’ve done everything we can to keep schools open and provide parents with options. We’ve even used money from the federal American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 to compensate parents who move their children out of schools that aren’t working for them. We want kids learning, however it occurs, and we want parents to feel supported. But Deputy Treasury Secretary Wally Adeyemo doesn’t like the idea and sent us a letter challenging our ability to do this.

Proceed to forest management. This is one of the most baffling issues. Wildfires matter out West, and virtually everyone agrees that land needs to be managed. The best thing we can do is thin forests and lower the supply of the small-diameter trees and underbrush that fuel wildfires. We have an active program at the state level, but the feds control 43% of the land here—more than 30 million acres. We can’t do this without them, and in recent years they’d been a great partner.

So imagine our surprise when, with no notice, after years of cooperation they simply pulled the plug in September on the forest restoration and maintenance program. Their failure to award bids for the Four Forest Restoration Initiative means the federal government has refused to assist Arizona in restoring our forests and reducing the risks of severe wildfires.

To this day we haven’t received a satisfactory explanation why Washington stopped working with us. People who care about land management and rural communities agree that cooperation is the right approach, so how could the federal government give up on protecting rural Arizona? The Biden administration, recognizing its blunder, has promised to get things back on track. But can it make that happen—and when? Don’t hold your breath.

The latest outrage is the Occupational Safety and Health Administration. For almost five decades Arizona, with approval by OSHA, has managed workplace safety itself through a state agency, the Industrial Commission of Arizona. Perhaps because the agency has sought public input and hasn’t been stringent (meaning oppressive) enough on Covid shutdowns and mask mandates, the feds now want to revoke our independence and put the entire state under the yoke of OSHA.

Imagine the reaction of local business owners on learning that Washington is in charge now, and the people they’ve dealt with for years in Phoenix no longer matter.

These aren’t theoretical issues. Real people—parents, students, small-business people, property owners, ranchers—are negatively affected by steps the Biden administration is taking.

If you want to know why the president’s poll numbers are tanking, look at Arizona. We’re a case study in how active hostility from the Washington ruling class is alienating real people. Unless this changes, you can take Arizona out of the Democratic column in 2024.

clean_body: Wall Street Journal Opinion: From the border to the forests and schools, the administration is hostile to the state I lead. | | | | | | | | Hello, | We wanted to share with you Governor Ducey's latest op-ed in the Wall Street Journal. We hope you'll take a minute to read the editorial and share it with a fellow conservative this weekend. | | Biden Wins Arizona, Then Turns On It From the border to the forests and schools, the administration is hostile to the state I lead. For more than two decades national Democrats spent big trying to replicate Bill Clinton’s 1996 Arizona win. After succeeding in 2020, you’d think President Biden would be working overtime to keep the state in the blue column. But less than a year into his administration, his record shows the opposite. If anything, Mr. Biden has inexplicably gone out of his way to antagonize, alienate and frustrate us here in the Grand Canyon State. Start with the border crisis. It affects us more acutely than almost any other state. And yet—along with Afghanistan—it’s seen by many as his administration’s biggest failure. Our border towns are being overrun; our law enforcement and National Guard are stretched to the breaking point; the flow of drugs is worse than ever; and our charitable organizations can’t handle the volume of migrants. What’s happening at the border isn’t a case of benign neglect. Criminal negligence is more like it, and Arizonans are paying a huge price. Continue with education. During the pandemic we’ve done everything we can to keep schools open and provide parents with options. We’ve even used money from the federal American Rescue Plan Act of 2021 to compensate parents who move their children out of schools that aren’t working for them. We want kids learning, however it occurs, and we want parents to feel supported. But Deputy Treasury Secretary Wally Adeyemo doesn’t like the idea and sent us a letter challenging our ability to do this. Proceed to forest management. This is one of the most baffling issues. Wildfires matter out West, and virtually everyone agrees that land needs to be managed. The best thing we can do is thin forests and lower the supply of the small-diameter trees and underbrush that fuel wildfires. We have an active program at the state level, but the feds control 43% of the land here—more than 30 million acres. We can’t do this without them, and in recent years they’d been a great partner. So imagine our surprise when, with no notice, after years of cooperation they simply pulled the plug in September on the forest restoration and maintenance program. Their failure to award bids for the Four Forest Restoration Initiative means the federal government has refused to assist Arizona in restoring our forests and reducing the risks of severe wildfires. To this day we haven’t received a satisfactory explanation why Washington stopped working with us. People who care about land management and rural communities agree that cooperation is the right approach, so how could the federal government give up on protecting rural Arizona? The Biden administration, recognizing its blunder, has promised to get things back on track. But can it make that happen—and when? Don’t hold your breath. The latest outrage is the Occupational Safety and Health Administration. For almost five decades Arizona, with approval by OSHA, has managed workplace safety itself through a state agency, the Industrial Commission of Arizona. Perhaps because the agency has sought public input and hasn’t been stringent (meaning oppressive) enough on Covid shutdowns and mask mandates, the feds now want to revoke our independence and put the entire state under the yoke of OSHA. Imagine the reaction of local business owners on learning that Washington is in charge now, and the people they’ve dealt with for years in Phoenix no longer matter. These aren’t theoretical issues. Real people—parents, students, small-business people, property owners, ranchers—are negatively affected by steps the Biden administration is taking. If you want to know why the president’s poll numbers are tanking, look at Arizona. We’re a case study in how active hostility from the Washington ruling class is alienating real people. Unless this changes, you can take Arizona out of the Democratic column in 2024. | "GET THE LINK" | | Please help us get the word out! While we’re happy to say goodbye to Cawthorn’s representation in this part of Western North Carolina, our fight is far from over. As one of the loudest right-wing insurrectionists in Congress, Cawthorn has caused serious damage that will take time to heal. And it is likely he will handpick a candidate to back in this race, trying to expand his brand of politics.
Jasmine’s message since the very beginning of this campaign has been to restore love, hope, and empathy in WNC. She’s continued to fight back against Cawthorn’s divisiveness, promotion of violence, and fear-mongering -- and just because he’s leaving doesn’t mean his influence and tactics will.
**Let us be clear when we say that Madison Cawthorn remains a large threat and we can’t allow him to carry on his extremism across our state.**
Although Cawthorn isn’t our opponent anymore, we’re still running to replace him, his ideologies, and his lack of leadership for the people of WNC. And even though redistricting has made our district bluer, giving us a stronger opportunity to win, our race will still be highly competitive.

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Our grassroots momentum just scared Republican Madison Cawthorn out of running for re-election in his home district. That’s right -- Cawthorn announced that he’s abandoning his constituents and switching districts to run in NC-13 because the new district lines make NC-14 more favorable for Democrats. He even lamented in an email to his supporters that donations were “flooding in” to his Democratic opponent. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = While we’re happy to say goodbye to Cawthorn’s representation in this part of Western North Carolina, our fight is far from over. As one of the loudest right-wing insurrectionists in Congress, Cawthorn has caused serious damage that will take time to heal. And it is likely he will handpick a candidate to back in this race, trying to expand his brand of politics. Jasmine’s message since the very beginning of this campaign has been to restore love, hope, and empathy in WNC. She’s continued to fight back against Cawthorn’s divisiveness, promotion of violence, and fear-mongering -- and just because he’s leaving doesn’t mean his influence and tactics will. Let us be clear when we say that Madison Cawthorn remains a large threat and we can’t allow him to carry on his extremism across our state. Although Cawthorn isn’t our opponent anymore, we’re still running to replace him, his ideologies, and his lack of leadership for the people of WNC. And even though redistricting has made our district bluer, giving us a stronger opportunity to win, our race will still be highly competitive. This is now one of the only competitive Congressional districts in North Carolina and Jasmine wants to create a seat at the table for everyone, but we need your ongoing support in order to make that happen.= | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = In this together, Team Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . subject: Maryland Matters article: Doug's commitment to the environment
body:
Doug is the only candidate with significant experience on the criminal justice and climate fronts. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PBkuPvZSb5yeS2JaaZjnAgUynpVfrYQdxyWfxGZBcQymhfvp-dAug_zDX26T6NyrMIfHHMRKgAEtkg2x3Gj-nTdI1VjF1Uy2etrHLMG96ckFgkv5F1MWMiEv41N9cVolD5vdjdxH4e5HAqngOVJ5FKhO63-RSJR8sFZRLEWhOnMn_Iz8h0HvK7VVAc3dzUcOxvIW3NmJ2d2xdcBiLXSUyK4ihB1S2uVho4XhuOXzuiNquuD2wHsyQSC1ydOMo1b8D/3gz/UiWxJCFJTdWY2k4pem9abQ/h0/wT3K96C8MLQcrvaqDtqG6CVzNqs4JfzvZbZSUnRJHNw)
---
Hi friends, This week, Doug had the opportunity to discuss the pressing issue of climate change with Josh Kurtz of _Maryland Matters_. In case you missed it, check out the highlights below!
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJKYp5ppLVwQFYuOLTkk_1PBkuPvZSb5yeS2JaaZjnAgUynpVfrYQdxyWfxGZBcQym_EdRxGhUyKKunyAm50aTMtN1HHKdzJJizJolz0XiuaMAdkAeG2CgfQ5z6vAwcIN8dNW_UwzLUquCwLsNgXEf8lIcb9gvyQdqvvXcRgdqC_urSpw53bL1F_kzB9BME86dnv_6aNbHIPemQj_8J5SC5nasq5P-o5vCPx9FmDht2Rbpwyi7BO3PAIs_1PqbIrnWzBN2ZSLgkVv3XNNsGCtQO/3gz/UiWxJCFJTdWY2k4pem9abQ/h1/0PKcgpEr4ixIeYKkgTwRMuaUghgCt0kR1FL9JXJUWbI)
---
**Gansler Says His Experience Makes Him Best-Equipped to Tackle Climate Change in Md.**
---
_[ ...] __The state is facing three major crises, [Doug] tells voters -- COVID-19, criminal justice, and climate change -- **and** **he 's the only candidate with significant experience on the criminal justice and climate fronts.**_ _[ ...] __"__It 's a priority for me, for when I'm governor, to make Maryland an East Coast leader in fighting climate change."_ _[ ...] __**As the state 's attorney general from 2007 to 2015, Gansler was an aggressive litigator against polluters. **He prioritized enforcing state environmental regulations, and came to every General Assembly session armed with a new proposal for environmental legislation. He convened an environmental council within the attorney general's office, which his successor, Brian E. Frosh (D), retains to this day, and conducted almost two dozen audits on the health of Maryland's rivers._ _As an attorney in private practice since he left office following his first unsuccessful run for governor, Gansler has advised cities and states on how to sue the fossil fuel industry for environmental damages. Just as significant, Gansler prides himself on being ahead of the curve when it comes to discussing the imperative of meeting the state 's climate challenges and putting the issue before voters and fellow policymakers._ _" It used to be something only groovy lefties used to talk about," he observes. "Now it's part of the mainstream dialogue."_ _[ ...] It's hard to deny his commitment to the environment and associated causes, and it's clear he's thought about how to use the tools of government to make Maryland a cleaner place -- and less vulnerable to the ravages of a warming planet._ _Earlier this fall,**[Gansler released an ambitious 32-point plan for combating climate change in the state](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vU0oIKHN0m1DDk6npYG3DWkOSnE0nbZ_l1zgaOgaCJVfmUKg5c52EMEjEc_9YHuj5wrXpMwUDrw_Um-UED_88IWFzmBsM8HQoNaoIrt3AmNVyJr-tl6UQ0JvsuJnwRyF0PbDtm33k3BzU0mNRIxfuwSC0KfY0tWam1mRs2gw8HmmzpeXKWJ7u8v80Xp3jZVFLGB0duAqVrZ8cOT1pMQnQY0AvI2_L1M9VZtqrdgzIHWCEhBSFXzOOL3ZAeC0uvi-Rz44umEPaBsKKb1Ygcz7IM/3gz/UiWxJCFJTdWY2k4pem9abQ/h2/xiFLiQoiG0pKHRh-5j4IvTT4fV1js-y5uYD4lOo5LWU)** -- a sign, he says, of how bleak the situation is and how all-encompassing the approach must be._ _[ ...] __Gansler proposes a wide range of remedies, from converting the state government 's vehicle fleet from fuel-powered to electric within five years, to converting poultry waste into renewable energy, to increasing funding for schools that are heated and cooled by geothermal energy. Like most Democratic candidates, he says he'd make sure the state is doing more to promote renewable energy industries, boost mass transit, and work with regional partners to address Chesapeake Bay degradation._ _[ ...] __Gansler is unapologetic about the elements of his proposal. "It's comprehensive because it needs to be," he says. __[ ...] _
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter | The only thing keeping Democrats together right now is hatred for the America First movement, its top fighters like President Trump and Matt Gaetz, and even its everyday supporters like YOU. It's the only way they can get things done, and enact an agenda that brings crushing inflation, Open Borders, and fiascos overseas. By making YOU a target! They're trying to vilify and take down all of us, which is why America First needs to stand strong more than ever. So with a deadline coming up in two days, we have to keep fighting - or else they'll finish up reshaping the country, taking all of us down in the process. Will you fight for this movement before time runs out? | == | | | == | Unlike them, our movement isn't bankrolled by Big Tech or special interest PACs. The support of the Silent Majority is what has made America First so powerful - and it's why they're afraid of us! So much so, in fact, that they need to vilify you as a domestic terrorist in order to justify their schemes. Don't fall for it - stand strong for America First before the deadline, and our movement can be what unseats these globalists from power in 2022. | | | == | Thanks for the urgent support, America First Fundraising PS \- The difference between getting more fighters like Matt Gaetz and President Trump - or watching our movement crumble - could depend on what we do in this short time before the deadline. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Moving the Dial in Mississippi – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8131916?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The Mississippi Center for Public Policy is helping set the policy agenda in our state – and our recent event with the Heritage Foundation shows why.**

A large crowd attended this week’s meeting, including teachers, parents and state Senators and Representatives. They came to discuss real concerns folk across our state have about public money being used to promote Critical Race Theory in the classroom.

Our team has published a set of **[policy proposals](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9ccf79a717&e=5703353baa)** to address legitimate public concerns in a way that is consistent with free speech.
---
|
---
_**Mike Gonzalez argues against CRT and says America is the greatest republic the world has ever seen**_
| **Aaron Rice, who heads up our litigation division, the Mississippi Justice Institute, had a great victory this week against federal overreach.** We joined others in successfully suing the current administration in DC over their draconian vaccine mandate. **[Read more about our important win here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6776ee0ca6&e=5703353baa)**

**Do you need a speaker to talk to your club or school?** Since arriving in Mississippi I have spoken at dozens of events from De Soto to the Coast. As someone that was not born American, I love sharing an outsider’s perspective on what makes America the greatest country on earth. If you would like me to come along an talk to your group, get in touch!

Have a great weekend!
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| TOP FIVE
---
| | | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a1d1448341&e=5703353baa)
---
1 **_Mississippi Needs Bolder Action for School Choice_** _ _**-** Read Douglas' newest op-ed in _RealClearPolicy_
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d52c4da5cf&e=5703353baa)
---
2 **_Why We Need to Combat Critical Race Theory_ -** Read Douglas' _RealClearPolicy_ op-ed
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ae1b79f955&e=5703353baa)
---
2 **_A MS Coast restaurant group played part in blocking of federal COVID vaccine mandate_ -** _The Sun Herald_ reported on the MJI's case against the Biden Admin.
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a317c5df9d&e=5703353baa)
---

---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=12ae36b5da&e=5703353baa)

---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re trying to draw me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again. RINOs and special interests in
_Sponsored message_
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkqb9ki24sdsp4ucepct101plhat35ibjmft3pq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zue45iqntno6sc72oenb28a10445f2ev3b22qmo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office – I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z4oe8ak33fik8ol2aa34mnncd85i2slpvp3ddbdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhu81l6vgo68k5dj57hid56fbr2ukk57qp721di0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)

**[Your donation,](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2q4362jhjv754qdvm7dgq21knvunjmm32j0a3tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5ubi7mattq431mlfgk7k6mts2gu3nnsuqk5r5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z60d6ar0a4qlrs6ihd3121k897thb8c3v0v0626o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlatv8smkfoojr559q79jguumra3a0t482ett9a0_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqesukbqm59b630ftbebmu9ebpf4m9r5mmpkomvg_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z63ps36q6gr7tkvk0ttktltfrfgn1lfa1fk6f0o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3j60o36cth2bs)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: We can't miss any goals.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team --

Right now, Los Angeles is facing once-in-a-generation challenges, from a homelessness crisis to the effects of a global pandemic. Karen is bringing together a broad coalition of proud Angelenos to transform the way city government interacts with and serves its citizens and to tackle these issues head-on.

We _know_ that through bold leadership, key partnerships, and community outreach, we can rebuild Los Angeles on a foundation of economic and social justice. **But first, we have to build a campaign that can get Karen elected.**

Tuesday at midnight, we're facing a mid-month fundraising deadline, and we set a goal of raising $10,000 before then. **[Electing Karen the first woman as mayor of L.A. will take hard work and investments from folks like you. Chip in $3 or more now to help us stay on pace with our goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/buDb_8STkFfVIkUx9qhCBNK1onQmcfKhWDaXI7ppYyw=/AMuqcly6xRM25EyNds2bg4RTwuerOwucdmrFnxu935s=?ms=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

Karen's determined to put real people at the center of her campaign. She's uplifting the voices of those who feel like they don't have a say because that's how we truly address the biggest issues facing L.A.

This people-centric campaign can't get to where it needs to be if we don't have the necessary resources. Reaching our $10,000 goal before Tuesday at midnight sets us up to kick off 2022 strong.

**[Help us elect Karen and make sure no one in this city is left out. Rush a contribution of $3 or more before our deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/buDb_8STkFfVIkUx9qhCBNK1onQmcfKhWDaXI7ppYyw=/AMuqcly6xRM25EyNds2bg4RTwuerOwucdmrFnxu935s=?ms=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211113_mm1_fndd_gq_geoost___kbfm_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

body:
|
| | | Newt Gingrich here.

We are officially less than one year away from the midterm elections, so I wanted to personally pass along the game plan House Conservatives will use over the next year to take back the House and Fire Nancy Pelosi.

Let me be straight with you. House Conservatives are in the best position that I have seen in decades to take back the House. But we need everyone on our team working together to get the job done.

| | Attn: Top Conservatives
Re: Our game plan for victory

_**Overview: **_

With one year until the 2022 Midterm Elections, House Republicans are on offense and primed to retake the majority. We have the candidates, the issues, and the resources to win over the swing voter key to winning elections. Bottom line: the current political environment shows signs for Republicans to win on Election Day.

_**Expanding the Offensive Map: **_

Following Virginia Governor-elect Glenn Youngkin's commanding victory, House Republicans are on offense, and are now targeting 70 Democrat seats. Youngkin's victory, in a state President Biden won by 10, shows that in this political atmosphere no Democrat is safe. _**One thing is clear: every vulnerable Democrat has a choice to make over Thanksgiving break: retire or lose.**_

_**RECORD-BREAKING CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT**_

Building off the success of 2020, we continue to recruit talented and diverse candidates who reflect the voters of their districts. The quality and number of candidates running so far show how strong momentum is for Republicans nationwide.
* More GOP candidates have filed to run for Congress at this point in the cycle than ever before: 831.
* House Republicans are on pace to shatter recruitment records with a historic number of women, veterans, and candidates from minority communities already filed to run.
* In nearly 90% of the NRCC's 70 target districts, there is either a woman, veteran, or candidate from a minority community filed to run.
* More Hispanic candidates have already filed as Republicans than ever before.

Team, Last week, the House voted to pass the bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — a transformative and historic investment in our roads, bridges, water infrastructure, and broadband access. Michael worked hard to get the bill passed in the Senate, and he’s proud to see it make its way to the President’s desk. Michael knows just how much Colorado needs this investment — with hundreds of bridges and thousands of miles of highway in poor condition across the state, this legislation will make a profound impact on the everyday lives of Coloradans, and create good-paying jobs in the process. So where do Michael’s GOP opponents stand on the bill? **They came out overwhelmingly in opposition to it. ** It’s clear: these GOP candidates aren’t fighting for Coloradans, they’re putting partisan politics over creating jobs, investing in bridges and roads, and making sure we have access to broadband in Colorado. From expanding access to health care, to combating climate change and uplifting our children and working families, Michael is fighting for Colorado’s values in the Senate. That’s why it’s crucial that we have the resources to fend off the GOP’s continued attacks on Michael — so he can win this race and keep delivering for Coloradans. **So team, will you pitch in just $10 today before our mid-month fundraising deadline? Well, he has 3 more years to try and mess up the rest - When you finish taking this one question flash poll, We need the support of every grassroots conservative across the nation if ** and the radical Democrats’ total control of America. Thank you, Billy Long Republican for U.S. Senate (MO) | | PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Did you see this ratings flip?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759622:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. Please chip in $5, $10, $34 or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759622:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)**

[**Chip in $10 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759623:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
[**Chip in $34 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759624:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
[**Chip in $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759625:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
[**Chip in _MORE_ ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759622:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game.

While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment.

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759622:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)
Herschel Walker

[**Donate Today ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759622:JamTyx2NN:m:1:3298722022:1B13F0E874CDD93588A1C48FC2CC5A96:r)

The Biden administration continues to abandon them and in turn, they are abandoning all of America. The Border is only getting more and more dangerous as the days go on. Thanks for your support! GOP Border Patriots Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Reminder: On Veteran’s Day, let’s seek peace through strength
body:
Our leaders have been flippant and unwise
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8X-UPxyYjgGOznk5p8jMZ5q7YMKIuGppF-vIKrltCzNCm1AANKgsr72gKAV_6-HHPqpPw75o_lK93phrRzMDUvUv8hA2wQxKnV7HBRKEOYIT-b53g0-rpVcUp3EVGlYSPM2xB8QySb-dNBn9XD6ejGqQhh_cVqa&c=8bvWjkch4oJ3ndRIWCC8AMZ6izVZGT4K5h_wqyc7hBLWqBAqoAS2fg==&ch=T2t9KUSYfbyzmtaK67tjWVVbIMtyCYQDAucoUYUL3kzSfKwNoQrExg==)

---
|
# Only those who have served in war understand its terrible costs
---
I was a senior at West Point when the attacks of 9-11 occurred. Fighting in the global War on Terror, from 2003-2004, I led a Tank Platoon in Iraq, then from 2009-2010, I commanded a Stryker Reconnaissance Troop in Spin Boldak, Afghanistan. There I was responsible for the second largest border crossing point between Afghanistan and Pakistan. On this Veteran's Day, I want to acknowledge the less than 1% of our society who has been willing to risk it all in defense of Freedom. Though in certain instances we service members have been unwisely and flippantly used by our political leaders, we took the oath with a deep desire to serve our country and to go wherever we were called. Shame on those in positions of political power who dishonored us by sending us off to misbegotten causes that had nothing to do with protecting American sovereignty. Nevertheless, our hearts were pure and remain so.
I give veterans my sincerest thanks and deepest gratitude for their willingness to risk it all on behalf of this great country. From a fellow veteran, welcome home and thank you for your service.
Now I call on the citizens of Colorado and Americans everywhere to elect leaders who understand the terrible burden of war. Only those who have served in war understand its terrible costs. We need more combat veterans elected to office to prevent the abuse of power that sends soldiers, marines, seamen, and airmen off to die for the wrong reasons. We need wise leaders who have experienced the psychological, physical, and emotional trauma of war so that they may understand the need for judicious use of force, and have a strong reticence to putting men and women in harm's way. We must elect leaders who will only resort to violence as a last resort, when the cause is Just.
Please watch below:
---
|
---
| |
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8X-UPxyYjgGOznk5p8jMZ5q7YMKIuGppF-vIKrltCzNCm1AANKgsrN2oPhbLTNyBYshHMoZgqz80QCECLhRWN_72mem7hl4ZYaREj0rp_WdKTtk7KX21dRAKUCNL9mok_ofmzOEY7C-swz_fqZWi5zA6PE2wMZRfLsHmRvmP75hDqR9x7r5HuAAcCzChD1TruzdUPuoTrzGyLL6i4PgbMXFwsuy7VU9&c=8bvWjkch4oJ3ndRIWCC8AMZ6izVZGT4K5h_wqyc7hBLWqBAqoAS2fg==&ch=T2t9KUSYfbyzmtaK67tjWVVbIMtyCYQDAucoUYUL3kzSfKwNoQrExg==)
---

|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8X-UPxyYjgGOznk5p8jMZ5q7YMKIuGppF-vIKrltCzNCm1AANKgskkZNYx1E_qgrGU-q1ewJjlfATZL1_zFrcSOT_EE09QDkjYSdzaNm7v_Rp2AzGqmf5wCUZREkN5Yj4KTQ5CFkVC0d0CEN9RO-A==&c=8bvWjkch4oJ3ndRIWCC8AMZ6izVZGT4K5h_wqyc7hBLWqBAqoAS2fg==&ch=T2t9KUSYfbyzmtaK67tjWVVbIMtyCYQDAucoUYUL3kzSfKwNoQrExg==)
---
| Like President Reagan, President Trump demonstrated that strength and the judicious, precise use of force leads to sustained peace. The American military should not be the World Police Force, though a global presence is necessary at times to dissuade bad actors. War should always be a last resort. Peace through strength should always be our guiding foreign policy principle. Now I am once again honoring the oath I took to support and defend the U.S. Constitution by running for the United States Senate in Colorado. Join me in creating a world of peace grounded in strength

name: Steve Daines
subject: We must STOP taxpayer funding for abortions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Congressional Pro-Life PAC
body:
We’re up against the radical expansion of abortions paid for with your tax dollars, and that is just not acceptable. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=506e5a955bfb4603a4766a8897abf078&_e=UXZyZ-OcaQOADUT9R_yh_n6DJBYHwKmu8_q-xsXBWpODXVukV4sQsXYdzwXTR2wR2Pmp68pSRJjfRtKqRgoPRkm12d_p5WlIgIZBck2qx--kEuhaeLPOqcwHV5kIZW2AiCVXeax4Npmy1JeiDKQ_TUKEzNZelcX78jk87OdJHLxpi6Mou_wG82fUep4D7oiQuaDVUeKfGDlKOiSi8tV0GhifTogWMmc6Qos1Uu94QcuEdgq912jBm6CoTnIdFn8xj0OJpD_xU2z0HtpkeDHWZkZLrQPyHc1cRRU230hO3JKqDd4T2jmserPV8WNOThvjiPyPPWKM4-K5opzXV3TWD_c2SeC3rrNV98_qP2gZIG3z9baVpX_sFQkIgkSGyBifDToq6O3l41NMscb0D_DQmnkIQm5aFz6_pC76iTrRu_Aa557lIrrkUWZgYHiw2RXj35fY6qqEGjj8p8j0xEr2hrXbImxMgDPDFZSLHTGjcIzhvNyfcMV5jviIh9Dz8-1y)

---
Fellow American -

That President Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Nancy Pelosi are still trying to push a massive, _$1.75 trillion_ "reconciliation" bill through Congress is bad enough - _but one of the worst things it would spend your tax dollars on is elective abortions._

There are multiple provisions buried in the _1,684-page_ monstrosity of a bill for funding the destruction of the innocent unborn:

* It overrides state laws and mandates abortion funds for the Medicaid coverage gap population in "non-expansion" states through Obamacare exchange plans in 2024 and 2025...
* It subsidizes cost-sharing and reinsurance for individual market health coverage without restricting the funding of abortions or plans that cover abortions - _to the tune of $30 billion..._
* It includes a huge expansion of taxpayer funds for Obamacare exchange plans that cover abortions...
* And it directs more than $18 billion in "health-related grants" - without any limits on funding abortions.

_Fellow American this is an end-run around the Hyde Amendment_ - which bans public funding for abortion.

As a member of the Congressional Pro-life PAC, we will do everything we can to stop any public funding of abortion by President Joe Biden and the abortion-on-demand Democrats - _but to truly rein in their assault on innocent life_ , **we must elect Pro-Life candidates in the House and Senate who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer.**

**[Will you step up now and join our fight to protect the unborn? Please RUSH a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more to help us reach the voters with our winning pro-life message nationwide.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=506e5a955bfb4603a4766a8897abf078&_e=UXZyZ-OcaQOADUT9R_yh_n6DJBYHwKmu8_q-xsXBWpODXVukV4sQsXYdzwXTR2wR2Pmp68pSRJjfRtKqRgoPRkm12d_p5WlIgIZBck2qx--kEuhaeLPOqcwHV5kIZW2AiCVXeax4Npmy1JeiDKQ_TUKEzNZelcX78jk87OdJHLxpi6Mou_wG82fUep4D7oiQuaDVUeKfGDlKOiSi8tV0GhifTogWMmc6Qos1Uu94QcuEdgq912jBm6CoTnIdFn8xj0OJpD_xU2z0HtpkeDHWZkZLrQPyHc1cRRU230hO3JI0uHsyog1sCsDUt6pVb6iFfpjv5tYh7fC4dqjfbg62Xf2XBOx_U7cVhYLx2Bzd0IzeEcL8-DTPdkS1vVZEEqqRTCrJ-hfAgNOydBC2_xFkiMtdaTANqApVAq2223_FvM0wxS6AOFy4AiEfnlk4axmsN2FZFeuy6qJv6yApc2V6STDe-vi3NGcy0VRKKjaOo7zvgTT5p6Ri9DvDWUzD5dmN)**

Your support today will help us elect new pro-life Republican majorities and give us the power we need to oppose the radical Biden Democrat abortion-on-demand agenda!

We're up against the radical expansion of abortions paid for with your tax dollars, _and that is just not acceptable._

For life,

Senator Steve Daines

P.S. We have an obligation to elect candidates who will proudly protect life. That's why the Congressional Pro-Life PAC was created. With the 2022 Midterms just a little over a year away, we are committed to helping elect a Pro-Life majority. **[Stand with us today by chipping in $10 or more!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=506e5a955bfb4603a4766a8897abf078&_e=UXZyZ-OcaQOADUT9R_yh_n6DJBYHwKmu8_q-xsXBWpODXVukV4sQsXYdzwXTR2wR2Pmp68pSRJjfRtKqRgoPRkm12d_p5WlIgIZBck2qx--kEuhaeLPOqcwHV5kIZW2AiCVXeax4Npmy1JeiDKQ_TUKEzNZelcX78jk87OdJHLxpi6Mou_wG82fUep4D7oiQuaDVUeKfGDlKOiSi8tV0GhifTogWMmc6Qos1Uu94QcuEdgq912jBm6CoTnIdFn8xj0OJpD_xU2z0HtpkeDHWZkZLrQPyHc1cRRU230hO3JKXDRfe-uPl0bu90wqFbFvSKP4JJAnWY8EntnAI9YFRGG4WRQyBQ5EMehPJdbLTgIHg1_QD-F9tlfxpznVqyoHnLQ2PhzrXhypT7J3r663evJxwQdqyWuMdsJruGuPjdJ5vXUmDxIBb0Wr18d1tQHNCasfU5r90Gr6cWpQspwhtyCIEo8-nSKzugnNMiVhIvEh0AuQVzHjBrhdwqadJGBxg)**

Contributions to Congressional Pro-Life PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. All contributions are made to Congressional Pro-Life PAC and no contributions will be made to Steve Daines for Montana.

Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=506e5a955bfb4603a4766a8897abf078&_t=m7l7u3IytTvKotxl-klQubypbHBoLr3XkPw57LVrmhIiwsytT4JY8M0mb4q-XTVRXiSWFuEw7dEttpnR9QTPMzRGVy3QG5Hbr2v_v5mgyAkh0ND40Gtn-wnSZU-RxMzmgN6-Q1GC41FGF7wQyJMJCDpnH4ebnO5UPA9G27L5LRw%3D).
clean_body: We’re up against the radical expansion of abortions paid for with your tax dollars, and that is just not acceptable. | Fellow American - That President Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, Bernie Sanders, and Nancy Pelosi are still trying to push a massive, $1.75 trillion "reconciliation" bill through Congress is bad enough - but one of the worst things it would spend your tax dollars on is elective abortions. There are multiple provisions buried in the 1,684-page monstrosity of a bill for funding the destruction of the innocent unborn: It overrides state laws and mandates abortion funds for the Medicaid coverage gap population in "non-expansion" states through Obamacare exchange plans in 2024 and 2025... It subsidizes cost-sharing and reinsurance for individual market health coverage without restricting the funding of abortions or plans that cover abortions - to the tune of $30 billion... It includes a huge expansion of taxpayer funds for Obamacare exchange plans that cover abortions... And it directs more than $18 billion in "health-related grants" - without any limits on funding abortions. Fellow American this is an end-run around the Hyde Amendment - which bans public funding for abortion. As a member of the Congressional Pro-life PAC, we will do everything we can to stop any public funding of abortion by President Joe Biden and the abortion-on-demand Democrats - but to truly rein in their assault on innocent life , we must elect Pro-Life candidates in the House and Senate who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer. Your support today will help us elect new pro-life Republican majorities and give us the power we need to oppose the radical Biden Democrat abortion-on-demand agenda! We're up against the radical expansion of abortions paid for with your tax dollars, and that is just not acceptable. For life, Senator Steve Daines P.S. We have an obligation to elect candidates who will proudly protect life. That's why the Congressional Pro-Life PAC was created. With the 2022 Midterms just a little over a year away, we are committed to helping elect a Pro-Life majority. | | Paid for by Congressional Pro-Life PAC. Authorized by Sen. Steve Daines. Contributions to Congressional Pro-Life PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. Contributions from individuals are limited to $5,000. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. All contributions are made to Congressional Pro-Life PAC and no contributions will be made to Steve Daines for Montana. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Humbly asking for your help, Derek (to reach more voters in all 67 PA counties!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s the important next step of our organizing program.
#
Derek,
You might have heard the news — we’ve got brand new, union-printed literature making the rounds through our campaign office! **This is a big deal, and the crucial next step in building out our robust organizing program.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37235?refcode=em20211113-3344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3344%2E434096%2EbAJYZX)
**If we learned anything from the unfortunate election results from Pennsylvania and Virginia, our organizing plan has to be *really* robust. We’re hoping to hire a team of organizers to reach voters in all of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.** That’s because our campaign believes deeply in the power of organizing — _including in rural areas of the Commonwealth._ We know it’s a crucial part of our strategy to put John in the U.S. Senate.
That’s why in a minute, [** _I'm going to respectfully ask you to chip in $5 to directly fund our goal of hiring our team of organizers to get this fresh literature out on doors across Pennsylvania._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37235?refcode=em20211113-3344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3344%2E434096%2EbAJYZX)
Before I get to that, I wanted to make sure you're filled in on exactly what the plan is, what it's going to take to fund it:
Organizers reaching voters in every Pennsylvania county is Team Fetterman's strategy to go on offense when it comes to flipping this seat blue. We have to organize hard in urban, suburban, AND rural counties. We're planning to ramp up a *massive* voter outreach effort across all 67 counties. But first — we have to find the resources to make crucial hires in the hardest-to-reach counties in our Commonwealth.
**Basically, we've got to make sure we have the resources before we give this big expense the green light. 🚦**
[**_Can you chip in $5, or any amount that makes sense for you, to make these crucial hires across Pennsylvania and get our new literature on the doors? We're still not at our goal to fully-fund this plan, but we're really hoping we can get there before the month ends — especially with you on board._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37235?refcode=em20211113-3344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3344%2E434096%2EbAJYZX)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37235?refcode=em20211113-3344&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3344%2E434096%2EbAJYZX)**
We’re really getting after it, Derek. You know the drill: We’re registering voters, removing barriers between voters and the ballot, and getting out the vote. **You might even see a member of our team at your door!**
Thank you for being a part of this campaign, because none of this would be possible without you. See you out there!
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211113-3344-footer&t=23&refcode2=3344_434096_bAJYZX&akid=3344%2E434096%2EbAJYZX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: 10,000 donations by Monday.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
we’re in for another close race heading into the 2022 election, and the stakes could not be higher.
#

Good morning.
I’m writing to ask if you can help me kick-off our mid-month fundraising drive with a donation this morning. By the time it ends on Monday, we hope to have more than 10,000 donations.
But today, I’m hoping the one you make right now can get us started. If you know the stakes of this race and that’s all you need to hear, use this link to contribute $3:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/Mid-Month-Drive**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211113-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1657_6688874_93dPTR&akid=1657%2E6688874%2E93dPTR)
Otherwise, let me explain why this drive is so important.
We received almost 2 million donations to my last campaign. I was very proud of that fact.
That support was a big part of why we won a close race. When we’re talking about 1 and 2 point margins, it all adds up.
Now, we’re in for another close race in 2022, and the stakes could not be higher. Our race was just moved from a Lean Democratic race to a Toss Up. So we’re going to need the same kind of grassroots fundraising power we had last campaign.
If we can do that, I think we’ll win again. But I’m going to be straight with you: If we don’t, we could be in trouble.
So these deadlines mean a lot. They are markers with goals we need to reach to stay on track. And since most of our donations come from emails like this, I have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign today? Our mid-month fundraising drive is coming to a close soon and I need your help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?refcode=em211113-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1657_6688874_93dPTR&akid=1657%2E6688874%2E93dPTR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em211113-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1657_6688874_93dPTR&akid=1657%2E6688874%2E93dPTR)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-nov21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em211113-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1657_6688874_93dPTR&akid=1657%2E6688874%2E93dPTR)**

Full speed ahead,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Kyle Burke, Team Collier
subject: Being with Mike on the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
My name is Kyle. I’m on the advance team for Mike which means I’m involved with event planning, coordinating, and traveling with Mike for the campaign. |
#
---
**Howdy friend: My name is Kyle. I’m on the advance team for Mike which means I’m involved with event planning, coordinating, and traveling with Mike for the campaign.** Being with Mike on the campaign trail, I hear the conversations and relationships he builds with every person he meets. He genuinely cares about solving problems that will improve lives, and he knows what’s at stake for our democracy in this election. Everywhere we go, we hear from Texans who are tired of Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick governing by hatred, culture wars, and empty promises. That’s why we’re bringing Texans together to offer a bold vision that leads us into a brighter future. But the only way we can do that is by hitting all of our goals for the rest of the year. So I’m asking you directly: **We cannot afford to fall short.
