name: Tom Perez
subject: what a week
body:
Monday marked one year to the 2022 elections, and the Virginia and New Jersey elections last Tuesday serve as a stark reminder that we can’t take anything for granted.

The 2022 midterms are less than **_one year_** away, team.

A year might sound like a long time, but I can promise you that it’s not. We still have to stand out in a crowded primary and win the general election in a state that’s elected Republican governors in three out of the last five elections.

So, Jessica, Haley, and I have been hard at work refining our campaign strategy, and we finally shared our plans with the team. **As one of my biggest supporters and a critical part of Team Tom, I wanted to make sure you received an exclusive, first look at our strategy memo, team.**

**[Take a look below, and chip in before midnight on Monday to help power our winning strategy!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38601202/316192170/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211112_MM1_ND_memo&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiNGI5OC1jMDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oue74kvRCToTHChSMH_gMj1o-jikEA0jnd_tQsMY5Bg=)**

Thanks,

Tom

* * *
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38601203/316192171/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211112_MM1_ND_memo&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiNGI5OC1jMDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oue74kvRCToTHChSMH_gMj1o-jikEA0jnd_tQsMY5Bg=)
**MEMO**
**From:** Team Tom Senior Staff
**To:** Campaign Staff, Volunteers
**Subject:** Updated Campaign Strategy - 2022

Team,

Maryland is a purple state, and it shouldn’t be. It is a state with deep progressive values and a history of electing leaders who stand by those values and make them a reality. This is why the Maryland gubernatorial primary is critical. The **ONLY** way we put Maryland in the solid “blue” column is by electing a leader who can win in November. That leader is Tom Perez.

Tom has a proven track record of getting things done. He knows how to win elections, and he has shored up early support from labor groups and civil rights leaders in the state. Now, we need to keep the momentum going.

Here’s how we’ll do it:
**• Expanded Digital Ads:** To stay competitive, reaching key audiences with digital ads early and often will be key in our path to victory.

**• Increased Outreach to Diverse Communities:** If elected, Tom will be the first Latino Governor in Maryland’s history. It’s important to Tom that everyone across Maryland feels heard and included. Authentic engagement with diverse communities is central to our values and a key component of our campaign strategy.

**• Unmatched Ground Game:** Tom understands that an unmatched ground game is crucial to securing victory. We’ll develop a robust field program to talk to, and turn out, voters from across the state.

**• An Army of Grassroots Support:** Small-dollar donations are invaluable to sustaining our momentum and implementing each part of our campaign plan. In order to win, we must redouble our efforts to recruit grassroots support from across the country.
**Maryland families are facing real problems, team.** Families and small businesses are struggling to get by in the wake of a global pandemic while the rich get richer. Racial biases and inequities from housing to criminal justice continue to hold back thousands of Marylanders. And so many students -- particularly low-income students and students of color -- are being left behind without access to the world-class education they deserve.

In less than a year, we have an opportunity to elect Tom and put the government to work to solve the toughest issues facing Maryland families. And we need your help to do it.

**To implement our campaign plan, we need to raise $17,000 in grassroots donations by midnight on Monday, November 15.** Encourage friends, family members, and our supporters to chip in using this link:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-nov-midmonth](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38601204/316192172/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211112_MM1_ND_memo&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiNGI5OC1jMDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oue74kvRCToTHChSMH_gMj1o-jikEA0jnd_tQsMY5Bg=)**.

Thank you for being a part of Team Tom!

Onward,

Tom & Senior Campaign Staff

******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38601205/316192173/-520940794?refcode=bpi_em_20211112_MM1_ND_memo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiNGI5OC1jMDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oue74kvRCToTHChSMH_gMj1o-jikEA0jnd_tQsMY5Bg=)******

Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/748ba01d-0344-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/a46b4b98-c044-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDZiNGI5OC1jMDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oue74kvRCToTHChSMH_gMj1o-jikEA0jnd_tQsMY5Bg=&id=116402624).
**** ********

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chief=20Jarome=20Bell?=
subject: A message to my loyal supporters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Watch now. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/rally-supporters-4657185?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ff452d0b32&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Dear Peter,

When I was endorsed by American hero General Michael Flynn, I addressed my loyal supporters in the room, in Virginia, and across the country.

My message is simple: the weak GOP has spent decades colluding with the corrupt Democrats in Washington.

The result has been a disaster: **communist riots and anarchy in our streets, anti-white racism in our schools, restrictions to our God-given rights, medical tyranny, and even massive election fraud:**

WATCH:

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=9032444d4c&e=af4b86f5c6)

Putting America First, and taking back our country from the Ruling Class is the only path forward.

[_**Will you help me do that with a generous contribution to my election campaign today**_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=611f667a0c&e=af4b86f5c6)?

My primary race is heating up.

**The GOP is already trying to sabotage me with a fake RINO who has consistently voted with Democrats -- even putting boys in the girls bathroom -- in the Virginia House. **

We can't let them get away with it again. **The stakes are too high**.

subject: Can’t afford to fall short now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Our primary election is just a few months away, so we can’t afford to fall short on our goals now.
#
With our mid-month fundraising deadline coming up on Monday, we wanted to give you a quick campaign update:
Yesterday, our team reached out about our goal of raising $2,500 before November 15th. Unfortunately, we’re still **$1,671 behind** , but there’s still time for grassroots supporters like you to make an impact and help us close the gap!
[**Will you chip in $5, or any amount you can afford, to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate right now? Remember: Erica doesn’t take a single cent from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry, so your donation would make a world of difference.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26176?refcode=em20211113-631&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=631%2E3698%2EbNvL49)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26176?refcode=em20211113-631&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=631%2E3698%2EbNvL49)**
North Carolina’s U.S. Senate primary election is just a few months away, so we can’t afford to fall short on our goals now.
Erica is ready to fight for ALL of us in Washington and be the 51st vote that Senate Democrats need to deliver on raising the minimum wage, expanding the right to vote, abolishing the filibuster, passing Medicare for All, and so much more.
That all starts with winning this primary, but we simply can’t pull it off without raising a lot of money from emails like this one.
**So, we’re hoping we can count on you today:[Will you make a donation to help us reach our goal before Monday’s mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/26176?refcode=em20211113-631&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=631%2E3698%2EbNvL49)**
Thank you for all you do,
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211113-631-footer&t=22&refcode2=631_3698_bNvL49&akid=631%2E3698%2EbNvL49)**

name: Adam Laxalt
subject: GOP Nevada Senate race moves to "Toss-up" as momentum shifts toward us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAXALT FOR SENATE
body:
Republicans are ready to FLIP the Senate!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760338:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r)
Patriot,

In the wake of historic victories in formerly deep-blue Virginia, Nevada Republicans are ready to flip the Senate as momentum shifts toward our movement.

The University of Virginia's Center for Politics - one of the most well-known political analysis organizations in the nation - has moved Nevada's Senate race from "Leans Democrat" to "Toss-up." Because I represent the biggest threat to their majority, Democrats are already focusing their false attacks on me.

This is a major sign of momentum and a clear recognition by the national media that Catherine Cortez Masto is on the ropes. [**Whatever you can give -- even just $1 -- we need your help to keep this huge momentum going.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760338:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r) [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760338:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r)
---

Virginia showed what we've known for a long time - especially here in Nevada - that parents are stepping up to fight for their children's education. They won't stand for critical race theory indoctrinations or efforts by radical liberals to get between them and their kids.

The results last night are no surprise to those of us but if we want change, we must continue the fight and make sure our voices are heard loud and clear next November, just as Virginians made their voices heard last night.

I am thankful for your continued support as we fight to protect Nevada. With your help - along with leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis who have endorsed my candidacy - we will be victorious.

Best,
Adam Laxalt

\----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760339:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r) A note for Patriot, from Adam Laxalt:

Patriot, thank you for your support as I take on the Democrat establishment to FLIP Nevada and the U.S. Senate. Our movement is off to a great start, but the battle has just begun.

Even CNN has rated my race one of the MOST LIKELY blue to red flips for 2022. It's clear, the road to the Senate majority runs through Nevada, but I need your immediate help to fight back against the Democrats' fundraising machine.

[**Help restore a Republican majority**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760339:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r)
Thank you for all your support,
Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760340:JBsVbx2VN:m:1:3299561967:82501062D3389D022C857FACE305E87D:r)
---

************

Las Vegas NV 89136

name: Eddie Gallagher, Navy SEAL Chief (Ret.)
subject: This political prosecution of Kyle Rittenhouse must end now, for the sake of the country.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760379:6JqBbx20N:m:1:3298722022:E37E7EE4885560347DA1BE2F8A6E6C42:r)
---
|
---
Peter,

**I know all too well what it's like to be the target of a vicious, political prosecution. **

After nearly 20 years of decorated service as a Navy SEAL, I was arrested and charged with the murder of an ISIS terrorist in Iraq. I was facing not only life in prison, but an endless campaign of slander and misinformation from our corrupt media.

Thankfully my family fought back publicly and fearlessly, caught the attention of President Trump, and I was freed from the brig and allowed to properly prepare for trial. I was found not guilty and allowed to keep my trident, but our life was a living hell for a long time.

**Now, Kyle Rittenhouse is in the crosshairs and I refuse to sit back.** As I've watched his trial, it's become crystal clear that Kyle acted in self-defense.

**[I'm emailing you now because through FreeKyleUSA, Kyle's mother Wendy has been furiously working to raise money for his legal defense, and they urgently need our help. Will you make a donation right now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760379:6JqBbx20N:m:1:3298722022:E37E7EE4885560347DA1BE2F8A6E6C42:r)**
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760379:6JqBbx20N:m:1:3298722022:E37E7EE4885560347DA1BE2F8A6E6C42:r)
|
---
More and more nowadays, if you're considered a political enemy of the powers-that-be, the rule book gets thrown out and anything goes.

The media, politicians, tech companies and other powerful interests band together to try and crush you financially and personally. The "narrative" takes precedence over the truth, and people's lives can be forever ruined.

**That is not the America that I dedicated my life to defend.**

It shouldn't have to be this way, but I know from my own experience that if enough people stand up and push back, justice can still prevail. And right now, justice means a "not guilty" verdict and Kyle Rittenhouse getting his life back.

**It can happen, but his legal defense is incredibly costly and he needs the support of millions of patriotic Americans across this country.**

**[I'm calling on you to help because believe it or not, your donation will make a difference. So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now, and let's pray that Kyle gets the justice he deserves.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58760379:6JqBbx20N:m:1:3298722022:E37E7EE4885560347DA1BE2F8A6E6C42:r)**

The truth, and our God-given right of self-defense still mean something in this country, and we have the power, today, to stand up for both.

Thank you for your time.

Steadfast,
Eddie Gallagher
Navy SEAL Special Operations Chief (Ret.)
|
---

Friend,

On November 13, 1960 my parents made the decision to move my family and I to America in search of freedom and prosperity.

61 years later, and the very policies that my family fled from are knocking on America’s front door.

Leaving the life we knew in Cuba behind and coming to this country was the most important moment of my life. Had my parents not had the courage to make that decision, my family and I would be living under a communist dictatorship without freedom of speech, assembly or press.

**[In honor of what I have dubbed my “Freedom Day,” I am asking you to join me in my fight to STOP the Socialist Agenda.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=00443bbe0e874e4fad6faea2e8f5cc51&_e=teVnszaBvZR3koOs9Cvh7qLP664-U0G9HZHWlajOn3zBQ_PG6e3fR3KywLC9u05KgpLd7PqF7lQHQEdQhm4OLLt0K8KnmsnDjbbCtKpw7IKDIWoFhjNOgh0uUX5r3dHxsd2zFkbHn6wxhjLhTlbtMQZxGqCjTIncDvQyOFr-OHuPh_TXvz-TJaktV6tHdDlkeOuc0BX_TK5ILQho8--JiVGHFrR5g98Z3qV_0kDaNAtM3LKVmUtFSY9Y-9t5f71HFi5PaUuIpPMp09zxWp4LTxX9tnn44u5EGpFnZLvjc9krA3hQINW2eYKESLQm1oBHpoMbs7JAaN-HpYajNrLrWuG_ZBw50XHXRZredj7OAg2qNk0gvjfsf2vdVyPWCTQYGeX0A3Zfe2IsR8c01jvgWTf4DGvWiirT6VPa53nPISvhNlbhgIWmrXCwCw6TNc62oSyH3peMPWNMUyIfncd4rN3gu2j3A2Bhv2SiPTYDoHExvJ351agG9l5KmYUP6BBLckR7CcPmZTf6qnIAEq4_yopTEBQKF0_Vh6lWdrXsqP4%3D)** | [**RUSH IN A DONATION NOW TO STOP THE SOCIALIST AGENDA**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=00443bbe0e874e4fad6faea2e8f5cc51&_e=teVnszaBvZR3koOs9Cvh7qLP664-U0G9HZHWlajOn3zBQ_PG6e3fR3KywLC9u05KgpLd7PqF7lQHQEdQhm4OLLt0K8KnmsnDjbbCtKpw7IKDIWoFhjNOgh0uUX5r3dHxsd2zFkbHn6wxhjLhTlbtMQZxGqCjTIncDvQyOFr-OHuPh_TXvz-TJaktV6tHdDlkeOuc0BX_TK5ILQho8--JiVGHFrR5g98Z3qV_0kDaNAtM3LKVmUtFSY9Y-9t5f71HFi5PaUuIpPMp09zxWp4LTxX9tnn44u5EGpFnZLvjc9krA3hQINW2eYKESLQm1oBHOTZ52lt6Dr7kiJmDC1Lc9xHfMohScCQ5Z87etIoOXQxVBiK1ecTkZa1HsyFeNE20QZXhNqd-Zo3F8cI-7uP8D5LTs-RwvX8Emqwesi6bdc_vq8snvo0X7zA_7b7qf2U68DTRUutYM1AmNVFzfY_4agDrQDpiuDjYaiY-YO0AbXFKTu7H0a5cUWHmskJEHCPOXvJn7LEWIPuio5IqCxDt9jizzKeuaOyAnHjJ_Zfj_RY%3D)

subject: We hope we can count on your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Since 2019, Powered by People has been doing the work to reach out to,
register, and mobilize as many Texas voters as possible. We know that our
democracy is better when it includes everyone, and that's why we're not
leaving any community out.

Ahead of the 2020 election, Powered by People organized over 20,000
volunteers, made over 76 million voter contact attempts, and registered
over 250,000 likely-Democratic voters — driving historic turnout across
Texas!

But our work didn't end there. During the winter storms last February,
volunteers went door-to-door checking in on their neighbors. And when the
Texas House Democrats bravely left the state and went to Washington D.C.
to call for federal voting rights protections, we had their back with the
funds to keep up their fight.

We want to make an even bigger impact before the 2022 midterms — and we
know we can do it if enough grassroots donors come together to invest in
our work right now, in these critical early months.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48822?refcode=ema20211113-162356&t=1001&akid=162356%2E444211%2Er3QYCw ]If
you’re able to, please click here to make your
first donation of
$3 to Powered by People. Every dollar will help our
volunteers register more new voters, knock more doors, make more calls,
and ultimately, increase turnout across Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48822?refcode=ema20211113-162356&amount=3&t=1020&akid=162356%2E444211%2Er3QYCw ]Contribute $3

This moment requires teamwork, and Powered by People volunteers are
already stepping up to the task in Texas. We hope we can count on your
support as well.

Thank you,

Powered by People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/48822?refcode=ema20211113-162356&t=1021&akid=162356%2E444211%2Er3QYCw ]Donate »

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Breaking News: GA race now considered “tossup”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759816:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. Please chip in $5, $10, $34 or even $100 right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759816:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)**

[**Chip in $34 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759818:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)
[**Chip in $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759819:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)
[**Chip in _MORE_ ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759816:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)
My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game.

While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment.

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759816:JuWJlx2NN:m:1:3253819041:D03D1C0612A45FC19575219363FBAA20:r)
Herschel Walker

body:
| | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDM-EBQfsbGG-s9DaLmbUEihpOkig6mNguK8yZijudTPis4F4Mj8IH3nnr6OeImF8tMAs0CyzkY1kT5Ibz-xHNlRjU2B2mHOaE7LEbUlT6W9zO7Av-t4mY_52jGBeUSFoi1XhhvYVLM-UNwnN54v_A_yIYtf99ceaWcK3ErjP6AppqkY6I4HDhKHlwDJ54DpKDyxum1_fLS3gLROA2ruaFI1f_5FaNysATS55kzM8hMyH/3gz/TGAycyGhS0WKz1nrVmjTdw/h0/x0S-B7fJd1rc5nfyxZ-UZuYVxuFVwbN8r4zh8RazviA)

Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising _even more_ to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats _will_ hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re just days away from our first mid-month fundraising deadline, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our first mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE1kXvT_Q9tki0_GCcDtiDHFCiKFP7igMykCvahsh6EtHH8KI6A66tbZeHXtIlwvV_-d-iuP-oFRtB1dsEeINz8IOW47BSQ-byeD0GMyR6QZTDJBRHEyLUwtXxLKoWJhVDf2No-Qe3h-SUpXVoXm0RfrZYQmwY-F7YoUZavfkn839yMOIhB4by0acPZIc51hEoZ8RKvyfva9xbTklpfHFwZzbvRRrOGc8Je4vPhrJe0s0D9pRsjwJR2aWsf45ki_0HaA1SxTkBQ1I9HM_43Z906fxCOuuknKbToCUzdXBI3DmLCLsxn-KvrAx1lB03veWono0hq30ApzsnU9VZKnBQPd/3gz/TGAycyGhS0WKz1nrVmjTdw/h1/thFlAE82E2lXQ-EfaVH4vcpRPCb0xREmhhW1kXHcccI)
No amount you can give is too small. Every dollar counts in hitting our goal and ensuring we have the resources to fight back against all the Super PAC lies.
Thank you for being a part of this campaign,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiKMa3u1TOqJlxSXRM-AJMU6sTJDxTPNm9JSg9MU6RfFDCVV5iGpqTUoe3ZqQ_ZPz0Oo0WjiBiDJt3YM2haKoxt7JymE6Q4cuQhyS-DpF9K2tFTMU_P6xXuwUUjRNZUdZl6QR-nHB9i97UzMDo2CPCjaLwdq-oCmWfxwMbuSDFVDSBVt862AZ2TJ7jp6C7zGhJwMDoOOFGJE__U0hh9M3b9E/3gz/TGAycyGhS0WKz1nrVmjTdw/h2/grGm80MzDWEngORxISmnPd4Z1VbQRT0YKz04bHc_E2Y) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPho3lNIr9nc2j_5V20nEmGL0R9NPb5zMsvFFcTG76IEjc9BkMWlBU1dQMlCGH0-lwlpLV6K96kF8tSI41rBFowXznr5qp-k2td5wAo-VoIUppbqhvrVIoSDIsWlLjuFnVvKX1rqxcPSPHubgl4_vq-5hPXpM3_LmmdQwWuR20GXOJFCmmBhK3GwvhSRSUOwem_Pb11AfO6LjfOghExC1_yJPN0GQoXFtzSlTuRbZPNCxq/3gz/TGAycyGhS0WKz1nrVmjTdw/h3/5_rCfM3AnccKpyEfDCQu2zlEZ99oEJ3VHOx3aTZg_V0) [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7ShGmM77BCu1Cd5fercK8DKmCb-XiwGUshfD7sXxn6OFHB1N1Bj8aMuqeycoTy3vqJ2-KpnvPh4844hcBZMNOp5o0-n5ffDorkRvt6sNiELsfmBUwwTEwI9xEKbRwkGINdKllbmotwYkrD90b-vqyVogdi8Mckok3s69L3f2H-ZtdrD8tbCVl65b4KPzP-lH_7P4ED_1iuNbJXdm-u0umPA/3gz/TGAycyGhS0WKz1nrVmjTdw/h4/I3bIiZ2PSi4Vlwrlcoh7Oq_LteayWu9jv6A-LitJXU8)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The Democratic party is dysfunctional
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

While progressives fought to hold the line and secure the future of
Medicare expansion, paid family leave, and climate action, Democratic
mega-donors threatened to withhold midterm contributions until Democrats
passed the Republican-backed infrastructure bill. Just check out this
Newsweek headline:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83986?refcode=em20211113-20477&t=1002&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]Newsweek headline that reads No Infrastructure Deal, No Check:
Democratic Donors Threaten Midterm Donations

What the donors want, the donors get — even if it’s not in the interest of
working people. At the whim of big donors and special interests, Democrats
pushed through the infrastructure bill, without fighting for the
accompanying Build Back Better reconciliation bill.

That is unacceptable.

We need to elect true leaders to Congress. Members who will fight for the
people — not the donors or special interests. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83986?refcode=em20211113-20477&t=1022&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]We have a shot at
electing 5 more Justice Democrats to expand our coalition and grow the
power of progressives in Congress. Will you chip in $3 to
support their elections?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83986?refcode=em20211113-20477&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]Contribute $3

AOC, Ilhan, Ayanna, Rashida, Cori, and Jamaal all voted no on the
infrastructure bill to protect investments for working people. (And the
big Democratic donors aren’t happy about it).

When Democratic mega-donors say they are tired of “infighting,” they mean
that they are tired of progressives standing up for the people and not
caving to obstructionist Democrats like Joe Manchin or Kyrsten Sinema.

We are sick and tired of big donors calling the shots! [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83986?refcode=em20211113-20477&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]If you agree,
will you chip in $3? It’s clear the Democratic party is
dysfunctional and that to transform into a party that works for the
people, we need more members of Congress like the Squad.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/83986?refcode=em20211113-20477&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211113-20477-footer&t=1028&refcode2=20477_1203867_wNtM1G&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=20477%2E1203867%2EwNtM1G

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team AOC
subject: We wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
These numbers translate to real momentum for our movement
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211113-2644-header&t=1&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)
We’ve set a goal to hit 12,000 contributions by November 15 in order to be on track to hit our November fundraising targets before the end of the month.
And, as we strive to hit this contributions goal, we want to share some of the numbers behind our grassroots movement this year to show you how our volunteers and donors have powered a truly herculean effort in 2021:
📅 Team AOC hosted **266 events with more than 5,886 volunteer signups** — doing outreach to the community after Hurricane Ida flooding, deep canvassing for the Green New Deal, and distributing food and supplies to our neighbors. 🙌 We **raised $6,620,365 for on-the-ground electoral organizers, charities and mutual aid groups, and progressive candidates** up and down the ballot. This is money that wouldn’t have made it into the hands of these groups without Team AOC and grassroots donors like you. 💰 More than**100,000+ generous supporters have donated more than 300,000 times** to re-elect AOC. Our average donation is under $17!
---
Our movement wouldn’t be possible without the thousands of volunteers who’ve attended our events, and the hundreds of thousands who’ve donated to AOC or our movement partners. That’s why we’re emailing you personally to see if you can take your involvement one step further and make your first contribution before November 15 to get us to our 12,000 mid-month contributions goal. What do you think?
[**Can you make your first $3 contribution to re-elect Alexandria before we hit our deadline on Monday? Even if you can only give a little bit, it adds up along with the thousands of other small-dollar donations we receive each day to make an incredible impact.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211113?refcode=em20211113-2644-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2644_2526796_kOk2fS&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)
**[Make your contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211113?refcode=em20211113-2644-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2644_2526796_kOk2fS&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)**
We wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t so important. But the truth is that our Republican opponents have already started raising against us in anticipation of the 2022 midterm elections.
That’s why we set such an ambitious goal of hitting 12,000 contributions at our mid-month deadline in two days. And that’s why we’re asking you to help us reach it. Because right now we’re still short.
[**We’re still 3,608 contributions away from our goal, and with only 48 hours left before our deadline, your contribution could be the one that puts us over the line. Can we count on your first contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211113?refcode=em20211113-2644-P_FND_MMF_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2644_2526796_kOk2fS&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)
Together, we’re showing what a big grassroots movement for progressive change can do.
Thanks for being in this fight with us.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211113?refcode=em20211113-2644-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2644_2526796_kOk2fS&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211113-2644-P_FND_MMF_GOL&t=24&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2644%2E2526796%2EkOk2fS)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Jim Jordan
subject: They’re gerrymandering me out of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jOdqn3At0v8KWVpU34j3Cg&sysid=1)
RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67058%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DElgwhoQxrqes5Z%2fK%2bczgg&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they’re trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio’s state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I’m emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67050%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=arj1k2ow%2b%2bofUsZQctZtgA&sysid=1)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won’t go along with the status quo, and as long as I’m in office - I’ll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I’m personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67052%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HS2DmP6Vca1cwqEFK475BQ&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67054%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2btOb82F8kQAvKNmYwc6DA&sysid=1)

**[Your donation,](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=66gooSu5WixpORESYqorxA&sysid=1)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I’m able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I’m not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I’m a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I’ll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I’m not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2biGpyv%2b58V4zxZtxDt6MQ&sysid=1)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67054%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2btOb82F8kQAvKNmYwc6DA&sysid=1)

Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn’t change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67068%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7pnqGkI%2b3tUBfmcdQE0sBw&sysid=1)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I’m asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67069%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pbfu%2bk9sAdQqOF5oY4StOQ&sysid=1)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY→**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c67054%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2btOb82F8kQAvKNmYwc6DA&sysid=1)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jOdqn3At0v8KWVpU34j3Cg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6580%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jOdqn3At0v8KWVpU34j3Cg&sysid=1)

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Time is running out to help Kyle Rittenhouse
body:
From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been political, malicious and built upon outright lies.
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4mbkkodrfd9jgu8862a7lt8l4b3f9ur21qgh62o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3gm4or4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now with trial underway, it has been falling apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcil54j9lqt17volfapqiqb57s4bbf24nak0vg8g_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3gm4or4c5h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv0hkesrqsv3c2s8a5lh9b1ia1dv5k52vadgdr4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3gm4or4c5h2bs)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zemdnn5ta3vr26rb1rd8b43brjfrkrglgqm0g9ao_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3gm4or4c5h2bs)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znpr98ifg14pt34f7tlfd4o416noabdp951eadmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj3c3gm4or4c5h2bs)
| | | _Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved._
Free Kyle USAPO Box 5322Reno, NV 89513

The good news is this – Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American. But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats. I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be. | | For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well. What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it. But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out. Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it. And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help. We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves. Thank you. Steadfast, Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.) | | | | Copyright © 2021 Free Kyle USA, All rights reserved. subject: Do you support this mission, Peter?

body:

---

People have been asking me recently what my plans are for the upcoming election. As one of our top America First supporters, I wanted you to be one of the first to know that I've made a decision:

**I 'm 100% committed to helping Republicans win office all across the country in 2022, and I'm focusing all efforts on just that. **

That's why I formed CAVPAC - my political organization committed to electing principled conservative leaders who won't be silenced and who refuse to give an inch to the radical Left. I'm traveling all over the country to push our candidates to victory and to fire up Republicans to turn out and vote.

_**Momentum is on our side, and we must seize the moment and double down on championing American values.**_

While some people are just sitting silently on the sidelines, I'm staying in the fight to save America and to champion the core values that make America great.

Do you support this mission? If so, **[please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759339:66nDEx2UN:m:1:3253819041:EFB5DC8B0D512C35B10C7224CE571350:r "please rush an emergency donation of $100, $50 or $20 to help us keep up the momentum.")**

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759339:66nDEx2UN:m:1:3253819041:EFB5DC8B0D512C35B10C7224CE571350:r)

My time working as President Trump's Secretary of State and CIA Director has put a target on my back. While a lot of people talk about what they WOULD do, _I 've actually gotten the job done and delivered BIG WINS for the American First agenda - from freeing three captives in North Korea to ensuring Iranian terrorists like Qasem Soleimani never threaten our freedom again._ That's made me some enemies, and they are hoping we fail.

_**There is nothing the radical Left and their friends in the Fake News media love more than to mock and attack those of us close to President Trump. **_

That's why I am hoping you will _**[rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First conservatives.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759339:66nDEx2UN:m:1:3253819041:EFB5DC8B0D512C35B10C7224CE571350:r "rush a quick contribution to help me champion America values and elect more America First
conservatives.")**_ The mainstream media and their Democrat friends want to say that our movement is dead, but we cannot let that happen!

---

You know me, you know my record and you know that I will never stop fighting for America. With you on our team, I know we can defeat the Democrats and get back to delivering real results for the American people.

Unapologetically American,

body:
WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States. | Fellow patriot

We’re not really feeling the love recently. Is it because it’s November and the holidays are around the corner? Have we been emailing you too much?

I only ask because the work that the NRSC does every election cycle is **some of the most important work done in politics** – you just happen to see a lot of it because we aren’t tied to just one candidate – we work to elect Republicans from _**every corner of the country to the U.S. Senate**_.

But if you want:
* Critical Race Theory taught in schools
* Continued degradation of society through tax and spend legislation
* Expensive gas

...then please feel free to ignore me! But, if you want a better future for yourself and your loved ones, then we’re kindly asking you to make an investment in our operation.

Quite literally, everything is on the line in next year’s election. **WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States**.

Every. Single. Vote. Is important. Consider that in the 2016 election, the **Democrat senator from New Hampshire beat her Republican opponent by 1,016 votes**. Here at the NRSC, we’re actively preparing for a similar scenario to unfold, and we’re going to need all of the financial help we can drum up in order to make sure that such an outcome doesn’t materialize.

**[We’re way behind on our November fundraising goals and that’s why I’m emailing you today. name: Congresswoman Demings
subject: re: my unlikely story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38602987/316201776/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDJhOGQyMC1kNjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M-ui0xMh2LMfdvFwg0U50X1-pCNNT72I9BBOKYnVC1Q=) Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hardworking parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first female Chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th congressional district as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his _own_ oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. **With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard.** **[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 today to power my campaign, and I can't reach it without you, friend. Can you make a $5 donation today to help this little Black girl from the South make history again and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38602988/316201777/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDJhOGQyMC1kNjQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M-ui0xMh2LMfdvFwg0U50X1-pCNNT72I9BBOKYnVC1Q=)** Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you.

clean_body: I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. | | | = Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hardworking parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first female Chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th congressional district as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his own oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard. = Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you. Val Demings | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. name: Team Jayapal
subject: Less than $27
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila wouldn’t be where she is today, leading our collective fight in Congress, without the support of tens of thousands of folks giving $5, $27, or whatever they could afford over the last few years, months, and days.
#
Peter,
Each fundraising quarter, it’s critically important that we bring in the support necessary to build and maintain a strong progressive movement. It’s also important that our support comes from the people.
**Pramila doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs.** These PACs — from Wall Street and Big Oil to Big Pharma — are trying to stop Congress from passing popular progressive policies that will help working people, families, and our communities. Pramila is leading the fight for those policies, so she is rejecting money from the very lobbyists trying to stop our progress.
We’re proud that our average online donation this quarter is just $23.61. **Pramila wouldn’t be where she is today — leading our collective fight in Congress — without the support of tens of thousands of folks giving $5, $27, or whatever they could afford over the last few years, months, and days.** Now, on the verge of a historic vote on the Build Back Better Act — which includes Medicare expansion, action on climate change, lower prescription drug costs, paid leave, child care, universal pre-K, and much more — we need to give Pramila our full support once again.
**[**Can you chip in $3, $23.61, or any amount today to support Pramila’s continued fight for progressive change? We’re making a big push to bring in 2,000 grassroots contributions by midnight on Monday!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8665?refcode=em20211113-799&t=1&akid=799%2E420207%2EYIf8_-)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/8665?refcode=em20211113-799&t=20&akid=799%2E420207%2EYIf8_-)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

## A Message From Mike Lindell
---
I spent this weekend in San Antonio, Texas at the Re-Awaken America Tour event and I had some incredible conversations with many great heroes like General Michael Flynn and Mike Lindell. Mike Lindell wanted me to to let you know how grateful he is for the support that great Americans like you have shown him over the last year in this fight for Election Integrity. It is very important though that we continue to support Mike in this battle. His business, MyPillow, has been cancelled by all the big box stores because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision this Christmas season not to FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies like MyPillow. I want to encourage you to visit www.MyPillow.com and look at all the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows). We are at war right now. Every dollar we spend is a bullet in the war. Spend wisely. Spend America First. Use the Promo Code JACKSON at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at www.MyPillow.com Kendra and I love all of our MyPillow products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too... ▪ Jackson Lahmeyer

Meanwhile, Americans are still trying to recover from devastating economic shutdowns that killed millions of jobs, closed countless small, medium & family-owned businesses for good, and destroyed livelihoods. And this is on top of the rising cost of living and insane gas prices that are also the result of their failed policies. We can't allow this to continue! With your help, we can eliminate far-left Democrats from Congress, restore a Republican majority in the House, and be able to stand up and stop Biden from doing any more damage to our suffering nation. My wife is a LEGAL immigrant from wore-torn Lebanon who waited 16 years to receive her American citizenship because she chose to obey the law. It's unacceptable that Biden and Katie Porter refuse to stop people from cutting in line ahead of people like my wife, but now they are incentivizing this behavior with money that's paid out from our taxes. We need to rid Congress of Democrats like Katie Porter who are rubber stamping Biden's failed agenda, and we need a Republican Congress with the power to stop it. Thanks, LCDR Shawn Collins, US Navy (Ret.) Republican for Congress | | Shawn Collins is a conservative Navy veteran and active Navy Reservist. Having served in Afghanistan, Shawn has spent his life fighting for the Constitution he swore to uphold and defend. He will take that same fighting spirit to the halls of Congress. ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Shawn Collins is a former member of the US Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. | PAID FOR BY SHAWN COLLINS FOR CALIFORNIA Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

name: Sheriff David Clarke
subject: Kyle Rittenhouse needs us. Now.
body:
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759384:Jg6-Vx2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C20B655816A0AEAED5CC72B4D4907EBF:r)
---
Peter,

From Day 1, the case against Kyle Rittenhouse has been **political, malicious and built upon outright lies.**

And now that trial has begun, it's starting to fall apart piece by piece.

**The good news is this, Kyle can 100% win this case and in doing so, safeguard the right of self-defense for you, me and every American.**

But the cost of his legal defense is immense, and they've now had to bring on extra security to deal with a growing slew of death threats.

I've been helping his mother Wendy raise money but we still aren't where we need to be.

**[So I'm asking you to dig deep now. Kyle needs your generous support and he needs it today. At this moment. I cannot emphasize it enough.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759384:Jg6-Vx2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C20B655816A0AEAED5CC72B4D4907EBF:r)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759384:Jg6-Vx2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C20B655816A0AEAED5CC72B4D4907EBF:r)
|
---
For 15 of my nearly 40 year career in law enforcement I served right near Kenosha as Sheriff of Milwaukee County, Wisconsin. I know the area well.

What was done to that city last summer by a bunch of violent lunatics was an absolute disgrace. Kyle was there that night, you better believe it.

But instead of starting fires, he had a fire extinguisher trying to put them out.

Instead of trying to hurt people, he had a medical kit offering first aid to anyone who needed it.

And instead of yelling at our TV or computer getting angry about this obvious miscarriage of justice, you and I are going to help.

**We're going to make sure Kyle gets the legal defense he deserves.**

**[So please donate to FreeKyleUSA now. It could not possibly be more urgent.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759384:Jg6-Vx2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C20B655816A0AEAED5CC72B4D4907EBF:r)**

Thank you.

Steadfast,

Sheriff David A. Clarke (Ret.)
|
---
[DONATE NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759384:Jg6-Vx2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C20B655816A0AEAED5CC72B4D4907EBF:r)

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Read this if you share my bold vision for NM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
| | |
---
Peter – Did you see my last message? I'm reaching out personally because we're _way_ behind on our fundraising goal for this week, and we're heading into a three-month-long fundraising blackout in just a few days.
To help me keep New Mexico blue, click here: **[[LINK]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603312/316203913/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=)**
You're one of my top supporters, so I know you share my bold vision for New Mexico. But if the GOP flips our state, just like they flipped Virginia this month, it could mean the end of all of our progress – from climate action to reproductive choice.
With our personal freedoms on the line in this race, we really can't afford to miss this month's deadline. It's getting down to the wire, so I'm personally asking: If you believe in this campaign, will you donate $5 today?
Here's the link again: **[[LINK]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603313/316203914/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=)**
I really appreciate your support,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Michelle Lujan Grisham**
Date: Sat, Nov 13, 2021
Subject: I have a request
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603314/316203915/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $5, Peter – but first I want to explain why:
**I just announced my reelection campaign, and a nother $5 from you is what it will take to hit our fundraising goal tonight and keep New Mexico blue.**
Our grassroots movement has already done so much for the people of New Mexico: We’ve had the most successful vaccination campaign in the country, invested in our schools and educators, raised the minimum wage for the first time in a decade, and provided crucial relief for small businesses during the pandemic.
But there’s still so much work to be done –**and that means we need to keep our Democratic majorities at every level of elected office to pass our bold agenda.** If New Mexico flips red, all of our progress could be undone under Republican control.
The _only_ way to keep New Mexico blue is by hitting our fundraising goals every step of the way. The strength of our campaign will be judged by our grassroots support in these early days – **but we're coming up short on our fundraising goal with a deadline at midnight tonight.**
Your $5 is all we need to bridge our fundraising gap and continue working on our bold, progressive agenda for New Mexico. **Please, Peter, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important:**
**[We only have until midnight tonight to reach our goal. Will you donate $5 right now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603315/316203916/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=)**

| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603316/316203917/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1071-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=)
---
None of the work we've accomplished would have been possible without your help. I can't thank you enough for your grassroots support.

Michelle Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/713c3781-ba41-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/fd098dcf-dd44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDA5OGRjZi1kZDQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K2TZUwhH1iyRyr24aZOF_6FluFmhZqXq3Lmn_KkCaQU=&id=127162320) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: POLLING@JohnCranleyforGovernor.com
subject: What do YOU think about the PUCO, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time to clean house. | Friend — Before taking office, the former chairman of Ohio’s Public Utilities Commission received a **$4.3 million bribe** from FirstEnergy. Then, the PUCO and Republican lawmakers granted FirstEnergy kickbacks and favors — at the expense of Ohio’s taxpayers. That’s why John recently announced that, as governor, he’ll clean house and fire _every_ PUCO commissioner, because the cycle of corruption won’t end without change. **_[But we want to hear from you, friend: Do YOU agree that we should FIRE the PUCO and appoint public servants who will work in the best interests of the people of our state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603478/316206089/444284290?refcode=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODdjYWQ3Yy1kZTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKaLnklIETS7Mx2186D64a2-QqVjccoi6UNMNU10VRg=&emci=b12490a1-da43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_** | [YES — FIRE THE PUCO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603479/316206093/444284290?refcode=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODdjYWQ3Yy1kZTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKaLnklIETS7Mx2186D64a2-QqVjccoi6UNMNU10VRg=&emci=b12490a1-da43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289) | [I'M NOT THERE YET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603480/316206094/444284290?refcode=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODdjYWQ3Yy1kZTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKaLnklIETS7Mx2186D64a2-QqVjccoi6UNMNU10VRg=&emci=b12490a1-da43-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)

It’s time to take back political power for hard-working Ohioans and hold our leaders accountable. John is committed to being a governor for the people — and returning responsible government to Columbus.
Thanks for sharing your input,
John Cranley for Governor

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603481/316206095/-1406512299?amount=10&refcode=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.c87cad7c-de44-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODdjYWQ3Yy1kZTQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKaLnklIETS7Mx2186D64a2-QqVjccoi6UNMNU10VRg=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: It’s time to clean house. | Friend — Before taking office, the former chairman of Ohio’s Public Utilities Commission received a $4.3 million bribe from FirstEnergy. Then, the PUCO and Republican lawmakers granted FirstEnergy kickbacks and favors — at the expense of Ohio’s taxpayers. That’s why John recently announced that, as governor, he’ll clean house and fire every PUCO commissioner, because the cycle of corruption won’t end without change. | | ---|--- It’s time to take back political power for hard-working Ohioans and hold our leaders accountable. John is committed to being a governor for the people — and returning responsible government to Columbus. Thanks for sharing your input, John Cranley for Governor = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

subject: Newsom has been located
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|

Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Endless Emergency](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooBiCxrKs0A86k0m2jZDtHpicOR1k63VTmqmvVpBkPwdw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_13a&n=1) Gavin Newsom has just issued an Executive Order predicated on the State of Emergency continuing to March 31, 2022. This is completely lawless. It’s what James Gallagher and I warned the courts about in hundreds of pages of briefing. Newsom will never give up power voluntarily – even, it turns out, during a mysterious 13-day disappearance. The Governor did resurface on Monday. He explained he was out for Halloween, though some have raised questions as to when trick-or-treating became a two-week event, how that squares with photos of him at the Getty Wedding, and why his whereabouts were a tightly guarded state secret. All the while, California’s COVID “case rate” (_the_ key metric according Newsom) is now twice Florida’s. We still have the nation’s worst unemployment. We still have a school mask mandate rejected by even New York City's new mayor. And I continue to get reports of cruelty at some schools, like lunchtime in the rain. [I’ve issued a request](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharNlQvvK5BNZcIzAo5Fr-5UgPEX1fiWP4H-8l7gB1iA1UQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_13a&n=2), joined by Senator Scott Wilk and Reopen CA Schools Founder Jonathan Zachreson, for an oversight hearing into these inhumane conditions. The good news: A Recall of SF school board members has such momentum even the liberal mayor and state senator now support it. The parent revolution has begun. [Support our Citizens Movement](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0JHWSzI75LyWvC6h1sivRLtVVWDof7SVZORZZbP1UPz4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_13a&n=3) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwq_XtVjFQ4OsRV0tw_jf7K9HFQDjMhCr3jsdxY-ERNgg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_nov_13a&n=4) Kevin Kiley

One more thing: Devin Nunes is terrified of losing to us. We came so close in 2020, even though Nunes outspent our campaign four-to-one. Make no mistake: Devin Nunes is vulnerable, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat him. Please, consider making a =. name: Jim Jordan
subject: They are trying to derail my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district! Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)
---

Peter,

They tried it when I stood up to former Speaker John Boehner, and now they're trying it again.

RINOs and special interests in Ohio's state capital are attempting to draw me out of a congressional district!

The gerrymandered map was just released this week, and it draws my home into a district halfway across the state...**a district that currently favors Democrats by 19 percentage points.**

**[I'm emailing today because I need your help to fight back against this political hit job.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)** The political bosses in Ohio are trying to keep me out of Congress because they know I won't go along with the status quo, and as long as I'm in office - I'll continue to be a thorn in the side of anyone OF EITHER PARTY who try to trample on our individual liberties.

**[I'm personally asking you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today to help me return to Congress. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)
**[Your donation,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)** whether it be large or small, will help ensure I'm able to continue holding the Washington swamp accountable both today and over the coming years.

My message to special interest insiders and political operatives alike is this: GAME ON! I will never be silenced for doing my job.

I'm not done fighting on your behalf. There is still so much work to be done to hold Democrats and Republicans in Washington accountable for reckless spending and the ongoing efforts to transform our nation into a socialist republic.

Let me be clear: I'm a target of the swamp because I will always stand up for our individual liberties; I'll never back down.

No matter what congressional map they enact, I am running for re-election to Congress. President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have demonstrated that we really are just one election away from losing everything our founding fathers built.

**[I need your help now more than ever. I'm not done fighting for you. Please send whatever you can to my campaign today to help me continue my fight on your behalf.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)**

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)
Every day, Biden and Pelosi are working to undermine the foundations of our society by:
* Forcing critical race theory into our schools.
* Pushing Americans out of work with vaccine mandates, supply shortages, high gas prices and inflation induced job cuts.
* Inviting illegal immigrants into the country and then PAYING THEM TO STAY.

That doesn't change the fact that my path to re-election just got a lot tougher. I know I can win, but I also know that **[I need your help now more than I ever have before.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)**

You know how high the stakes are for the future of our country. And we both see the great momentum we are building with victories in Virginia and throughout the country.

I'm asking you to show your support for stopping the Biden/Pelosi agenda and helping take back the House for the people!

For Liberty,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)
Jim

[** HELP ME RETURN TO CONGRESS
CHIP IN TODAY->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58759413:69ulIx2kN:m:1:3253819041:6F2C828AA8FCB3ADD7239F5D6A015F95:r)

| | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Congressman Carlos A. Gimenez
subject: 61 years ago today, I pursued the American Dream
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
What Biden’s done to America Friends, On November 13, 1960 my parents made the decision to move my family and I to America in search of freedom and prosperity. 61 years later, and the very policies that my family fled from are knocking on America’s front door. Leaving the life we knew in Cuba behind and coming to this country was the most important moment of my life. Had my parents not had the courage to make that decision, my family and I would be living under a communist dictatorship without freedom of speech, assembly or press.
[**In honor of what I have dubbed my “Freedom Day,” I am asking you to join me in my fight to STOP the Socialist Agenda.** ](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=312f3f0a505e47cebaef5872db1c57dc&_e=GrSYTwGdybcfZ6ZULQ2rmWMI0uZO4KQqi6ic1QUEuIMsr08YaPdvtsKYRo_g17NXgtiS666mqwj2nzopQjSwCxqf_zo7PYbTgC5qMrHblowmkJeBdZ12cepxKkV2KJ_q-L98VHe-E6hPRu_GS0aL0NWQqHtceuo139aCiNyFiSW9mhzp-WpPMrvZryS-C3cB5-3I0MrBfIXlfSl_A8Lz8KiWmIp19h3CERHmLBIrnCs8SUQJmAMs7aXj0liXzBZA7d_-Up3OSr1X-NCuoPghdahRQVkfUR2016vXYj8dUdFtt4aaxsjAImWq4xJVO7rXSMneRbhVWvkhngMIC7U2iC6iTlrieYSOdNHfJdFGmYPVAWVZS02u5N4Cq6tschQU2q-IMUDUiRJv80snIJ-socuTTNMvf8x4xFW6oVXdMvBcKmiG-okj1Js7Yzo0mYv_xALcyoLms3UizSPNnc4zFA%3D%3D) [**RUSH IN A DONATION NOW TO STOP THE SOCIALIST AGENDA**](http://links.jimbanks.us/u/click?_t=14b4f09b550c426eb4f913b115f47659&_m=312f3f0a505e47cebaef5872db1c57dc&_e=GrSYTwGdybcfZ6ZULQ2rmWMI0uZO4KQqi6ic1QUEuIMsr08YaPdvtsKYRo_g17NXgtiS666mqwj2nzopQjSwCxqf_zo7PYbTgC5qMrHblowmkJeBdZ12cepxKkV2KJ_q-L98VHe-E6hPRu_GS0aL0NWQqHtceuo139aCiNyFiSW9mhzp-WpPMrvZryS-C3cB5-3I0MrBfIXlfSl_A8Lz8KiWmIp19h3CERHmLBIrnCs8SUQJmAMs7aXj0liXzBZAj9YA5kNKI8RlkW125GK_i6w-Q4Vkk06oYVyNHWSjT8dHMq7s-UIyV4-xSrkCkaf9nn4m3tsCJkAmrXJETsZZOGApevD4CdOllY4k_f2zQWeCv3IxuFM2bJG9jxM5F3hfGJ_j0fr3GGFOhmsfoK4VKBB9qGr74CUr9P4Dumr8rzBlb43yFa1RRhMrKNVSiKVJOl2XtxrmdQokksuv1-OSZQ%3D%3D) From Cuba to Congress, I have fought tooth and nail to achieve the American Dream. clean_body: What Biden’s done to America Friends, On November 13, 1960 my parents made the decision to move my family and I to America in search of freedom and prosperity. 61 years later, and the very policies that my family fled from are knocking on America’s front door. Leaving the life we knew in Cuba behind and coming to this country was the most important moment of my life. Had my parents not had the courage to make that decision, my family and I would be living under a communist dictatorship without freedom of speech, assembly or press. From Cuba to Congress, I have fought tooth and nail to achieve the American Dream. I refuse to let radical socialists like Nancy Pelosi and AOC destroy everything that my parents believed in when they moved my family to this great country. This is the fight of our lives, friend. I need loyal patriots from all around the country to join me in sending this very clear message to Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and any other radical socialist who dares threaten the American way of life: WE WILL NOT BACK DOWN! Thank you for joining me, Congressman Carlos A. Gimenez PAID FOR BY JIM BANKS FOR CONGRESS, INC.
