name: Daria
subject: We’re feeling a little left out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States. | Fellow patriot

We’re not really feeling the love recently. Is it because it’s November and the holidays are around the corner? Have we been emailing you too much?

I only ask because the work that the NRSC does every election cycle is **some of the most important work done in politics** – you just happen to see a lot of it because we aren’t tied to just one candidate – we work to elect Republicans from _**every corner of the country to the U.S. Senate**_.

But if you want:
* Critical Race Theory taught in schools
* Continued degradation of society through tax and spend legislation
* Expensive gas

...then please feel free to ignore me! But, if you want a better future for yourself and your loved ones, then we’re kindly asking you to make an investment in our operation.

Quite literally, everything is on the line in next year’s election. **WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States**.

Every. Single. Vote. Is important. Consider that in the 2016 election, the **Democrat senator from New Hampshire beat her Republican opponent by 1,016 votes**. Here at the NRSC, we’re actively preparing for a similar scenario to unfold, and we’re going to need all of the financial help we can drum up in order to make sure that such an outcome doesn’t materialize.

**[We’re way behind on our November fundraising goals and that’s why I’m emailing you today. clean_body: WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States. | Fellow patriot We’re not really feeling the love recently. Is it because it’s November and the holidays are around the corner? Have we been emailing you too much? I only ask because the work that the NRSC does every election cycle is some of the most important work done in politics – you just happen to see a lot of it because we aren’t tied to just one candidate – we work to elect Republicans from every corner of the country to the U.S. Senate. But if you want: Critical Race Theory taught in schools Continued degradation of society through tax and spend legislation Expensive gas ...then please feel free to ignore me! But, if you want a better future for yourself and your loved ones, then we’re kindly asking you to make an investment in our operation. Quite literally, everything is on the line in next year’s election. WE ONLY NEED TO FLIP ONE SENATE SEAT to stop socialism from taking hold in the United States. Every. Single. Vote. Is important. Consider that in the 2016 election, the Democrat senator from New Hampshire beat her Republican opponent by 1,016 votes. Here at the NRSC, we’re actively preparing for a similar scenario to unfold, and we’re going to need all of the financial help we can drum up in order to make sure that such an outcome doesn’t materialize. Please, don’t ghost us.** Thank you for your help, Daria NRSC Digital Director If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! subject: You’re the engine of this campaign
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Team—

I wanted to make sure you saw this: 95% of contributions to our campaign in October came from small-dollar donors like you.

This is big news, team. I mean it when we say that grassroots donors like you are powering this campaign. Without you, we simply couldn’t be here.

On the other hand, Ron DeSantis is raising most of his money from GOP mega-donors from across the country. We need your help to keep pace and fight back with our army of grassroots supporters, so please click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1113frnumbers]

Throughout my life, people have underestimated me. From my years at the University of Florida to my time in the courtroom, I’ve been told plenty of times that I won’t be able to make a difference.

When I first ran for Commissioner of Agriculture, no one thought we could win. We shocked the state of Florida--and now we have an army of grassroots supporters like you powering our movement to stop Ron DeSantis and try something new.

I’m humbled and honored by your continued support, and I hope you’ll consider chipping in again. Click here to donate now and help us build on our momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-nov-21?refcode=1113frnumbers]

With Gratitude,

Nikki

name: Brandon Mosely
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P
body:
I always think it’s important to remember why we’re in this fight.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603838/316226062/1309164061?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDdlNGI0YS1lODQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Kwp8mfvYryT7nCNpRFW9_inDebxGwQE1F2f7GxHNN4=)
---
Friend, whether you’re new to the team or you’ve been here from the beginning, I always think it’s important to remember why we’re in this fight.

**So, I wanted to take just a minute of your time to explain why I’m running, and why[your $5 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38603839/316226063/-1394585274?amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250&refcode=BMFC_20211113_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDdlNGI0YS1lODQ0LWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Kwp8mfvYryT7nCNpRFW9_inDebxGwQE1F2f7GxHNN4=) is critical to defeating my MAGA opponent:** | 1\. I’m in this race because our democracy is in decline, and my very own representative is leading its degradation.

2\. I’m in this race because my unhinged MAGA Republican opponent, has wasted the last 30 years of my community’s trust and we can no longer afford empty promises and absent representation.

3\. I’m in this race because we deserve leaders that fight for things like voting rights and healthcare, not the interests of corporations that line their pockets.
---
**I’m running to bring better leadership to my community, and to stop the MAGA Republicans from taking back the House in the process.**
[**Look my district just swung from leaning Republican to a pure TOSS-UP. name: Mike Waltz
subject: Let’s put together our action plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress [Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter, I’m on a mission to change the way things work in Washington.

We need leaders who put service before self, and who understand the cost of the freedoms we too often take for granted here in America.

Fighting as a Green Beret in the Middle East, I saw firsthand that these kind of missions take time, courage, and most importantly, teamwork.

That’s why I want YOU to help me develop my plan to take back the House and defend American values.

I put together a quick survey for you to let me know which issues are most important to you, and it would be a HUGE VALUE to our mission if you took a few minutes to fill it out.

**[Please complete our “American Mission” survey today and me know what issues are most important to YOU.](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=95930037c4ad41518b0fb3517e09a75b&_e=GaoDHOxl_rqBqXHN-sjXWAKmjBmQwdJtZt_qZUNiaTrkgbW2gEuRc6rJJxl6enx5UhJvaU5KtiqyIveLeNS0wRriJSAxH449EvMgfSS-qypeKr5jKErxOAMVQ2JrVI10SiUTT042wrx3zMLgcHb0r1Ju8ozxFAWClSY9YBIMO8AXncqhJ1-bZIiStksavSi6ja-PSG0ASo0mhFhVvbm3AwmZ0sRad58dPxNrelvrRMK3uDRTv4r2HfAm--nfab-wQ0oTuSairqb0wnYAhBXGlLdt7-mVd3wVq6P3YGRpeUk571VBko_ur2aBKTPghOo6glbPMGVZV5RYFxJW0YfYA7MNuL9nMYmiJyWqdmuDregu97glDs5nnzuvL5MMXGUlVFNjvjKNV4B8B93qUUM8mhx7zbeygxH1QVMxU3b1MgigOIPnsPTnkVuNSdk8ng2RqkTspjK2zLYm3ThOJwIjIQOSEvN2lAUlgoTng7IZ-hXC1lsyJ_YhPvkgIxOWgoTARpS9CDF41YCVm2Kb6NijsA%3D%3D)** [**Take The Survey**](http://links.waltzcongress.com/u/click?_t=70a297b9f5f74ea19d12ada25520ec17&_m=95930037c4ad41518b0fb3517e09a75b&_e=GaoDHOxl_rqBqXHN-sjXWAKmjBmQwdJtZt_qZUNiaTrkgbW2gEuRc6rJJxl6enx5UhJvaU5KtiqyIveLeNS0wRriJSAxH449EvMgfSS-qypeKr5jKErxOAMVQ2JrVI10SiUTT042wrx3zMLgcHb0r1Ju8ozxFAWClSY9YBIMO8AXncqhJ1-bZIiStksavSi6ja-PSG0ASo0mhFhVvbm3AwmZ0sRad58dPxNrelvrRMK3uDRTv4r2HfAm--nfab-wQ0oTuSairqb0wnYAhBXGlLdt7-mVd3wVq6P3YGRpeUmiU5lJAxd0WdSLpoFY-4LP6lF083gaCDL0Lsf6f0qhLwjIdkUx_9YS4mdQnWBiRU-36mPljfIOhUe_V4vVGbZXVKc3E_DuDZC0lrKJIC7IPC0alt3qvpxH1GtV2ioyIVSN1vz0xBzDW3smPGhMdIgk3GprhuLwcL__Wrg0mX36wdjziwjwcpnRQGO010OKelz2Z_KA5dkBv9aLOqVRoaW-BwFxFu6FsKqo3AbztsItQg%3D%3D) In Service, Col. clean_body: Peter, I’m on a mission to change the way things work in Washington. We need leaders who put service before self, and who understand the cost of the freedoms we too often take for granted here in America. Fighting as a Green Beret in the Middle East, I saw firsthand that these kind of missions take time, courage, and most importantly, teamwork. That’s why I want YOU to help me develop my plan to take back the House and defend American values. I put together a quick survey for you to let me know which issues are most important to you, and it would be a HUGE VALUE to our mission if you took a few minutes to fill it out. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Protect Public Lands -- via Billings HQ
subject: Protecting what we love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
Dear Friend, Montana boasts some of the most beautiful lands in all of the country. We have spectacular mountain views and no shortage of prime locat | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=c37e29ea685c4116a49da39a7317e6a3&_e=3de0x1QuGjXosaDyD_oLWwvw0IAv4fd4SqhAH7RC3K5DB70jcwqr_1fGzQvpAC4YFrVNunfXjW1ejyhMyHRaJZUNODNVphW-EupJqiFcdEq3zZwEfoauqGtZ2cmTRw-cT2yXJgj5Mp3-rvvvDMXiXnRyYjS5GXvhpCgx7AIHZ1Cq_OILRaHqjmGg5yBBumuBxkLES6Ld92pcLZvGH7yphlk9QnxEPgBdHKMEg53vhjeprY_vPCLUVeYVndU-58V7bhtO9R0hm7Wh8yhywB1ZlsVz7XlV6C500RKp8LYl8itPfVVfhmxOEHRxQxrNLmLk7asdjvm7bUDTp6ZRnoAJ_wq-pFtgEoNBAs4OTrCzypVyTcIv6x1BFMwMX1IdYLz_) Dear Friend, Montana boasts some of the most beautiful lands in all of the country. We have spectacular mountain views and no shortage of prime locations for hiking, camping, biking, fishing, backpacking, swimming, skiing, hunting, and really anything else you’d want to do in the wilderness. [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=c37e29ea685c4116a49da39a7317e6a3&_e=3de0x1QuGjXosaDyD_oLWwvw0IAv4fd4SqhAH7RC3K5DB70jcwqr_1fGzQvpAC4YFrVNunfXjW1ejyhMyHRaJZUNODNVphW-EupJqiFcdEq3zZwEfoauqGtZ2cmTRw-cT2yXJgj5Mp3-rvvvDMXiXnRyYjS5GXvhpCgx7AIHZ1CbPV_MP9TGAN1GVvc192V_wQPYMEiYs03tY_XcBQgBj1ZA958HXavB5c29b-m-Djlxf3QeQbjL_L3b84xPNXFvVLQKTMnvwR6WBZfu0FJf8StiE71-0HMmn7quak7zSXFJoFgYpruj7lvC1r42CzgpLG2BarJlRWn4EXaJKJq4csAjWmC7Vmg6mn1Skg1zPbsvvwBvbWqGDurv9UT4qg0z) But, Montana’s public lands aren’t insulated from politics. As one of the most widely published outdoor writers and photographers, Jack is more than just a little familiar with all that Montana has to offer. Protecting our wilderness is a big reason why he’s running. **[Republicans are pushing to transfer federal lands to states and hand them over to private citizens to use for profit -- will you sign our petition to tell Republicans that our public lands are crucial to making Montana the place we love?](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=c37e29ea685c4116a49da39a7317e6a3&_e=3de0x1QuGjXosaDyD_oLWwvw0IAv4fd4SqhAH7RC3K5DB70jcwqr_1fGzQvpAC4YFrVNunfXjW1ejyhMyHRaJZUNODNVphW-EupJqiFcdEq3zZwEfoauqGtZ2cmTRw-cT2yXJgj5Mp3-rvvvDMXiXnRyYjS5GXvhpCgx7AIHZ1AFR8ir5GShtb77bUeAvQ1EUQBGxc8DavjCUNZOw1zwM-Wd2XMPqxqc-cWdxOodzoPeNQPyNDEJmOMWYAJKl91_SX12T6vCxKI4cppXP54_xJw2HivKGzEmgOS__WpN9onu0y7smBPUxxv5a2P7nSWV79qL8f3_MwU7-xbRGOW2Gdb9GdCKNfHnwfvrjIpxa5wpfaWR4dV7q1PMpUoFkEKR)** [ SIGN HERE ](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=c37e29ea685c4116a49da39a7317e6a3&_e=3de0x1QuGjXosaDyD_oLWwvw0IAv4fd4SqhAH7RC3K5DB70jcwqr_1fGzQvpAC4YFrVNunfXjW1ejyhMyHRaJZUNODNVphW-EupJqiFcdEq3zZwEfoauqGtZ2cmTRw-cT2yXJgj5Mp3-rvvvDMXiXnRyYjS5GXvhpCgx7AIHZ1DRipCXgX4FbOc4aCJHVZ3AULvHc0Xk_u9xACBS8zqRYHTGKLnLRnkTi1WxjXbsU3oXOX39KPSlZrR2WRI0gSQYyd8iG9t49Ly-MVrWgEVC8wXG869DPFq-K1D3876rhrytN8hGl4Voir5hC9oQmWQhj6Ts0XpuwfgCfvFx5koRZDI_7pyhtLYIdYHKq-_5O0iG9EF39FCeIzhvUxgtqZLf) Among Jack’s books are Creating a Traditional Elk Camp, Elk Hunting Montana, and Elk: A Falcon Field Guide. So, trust us, he knows what he’s talking about. Destroying the outdoors is exactly what he will stop Republicans from doing in Congress. **[Help us protect what we love. clean_body: Dear Friend, Montana boasts some of the most beautiful lands in all of the country. We have spectacular mountain views and no shortage of prime locat | | | Dear Friend, Montana boasts some of the most beautiful lands in all of the country. We have spectacular mountain views and no shortage of prime locations for hiking, camping, biking, fishing, backpacking, swimming, skiing, hunting, and really anything else you’d want to do in the wilderness. But, Montana’s public lands aren’t insulated from politics. As one of the most widely published outdoor writers and photographers, Jack is more than just a little familiar with all that Montana has to offer. Protecting our wilderness is a big reason why he’s running. Among Jack’s books are Creating a Traditional Elk Camp, Elk Hunting Montana, and Elk: A Falcon Field Guide. So, trust us, he knows what he’s talking about. Destroying the outdoors is exactly what he will stop Republicans from doing in Congress. Thank you so much, Billings HQ Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-01 in Washington D.C. **** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Not a single cent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John doesn't accept a dime of corporate PAC money.
#
From day one, John Fetterman made a commitment to supporters like you, Derek.
**Our campaign will never accept a single cent from corporate PACs.**
Corporate kickbacks and favors for big donors are *so* commonplace in Washington, it can be hard to tell who elected officials even represent.
But John has made it clear from Day One. You’ll never have to wonder if he is voting in the interests of corporations or big-dollar donors, or in the interests of YOU, the working people.
You won't find John begging corporate PACs for giant checks or calling up dark money groups for help.
**Instead, we depend on contributions from folks giving what they can, when they can, from emails just like this one.**
**[If you believe that Congress should champion the interests of the people — and not corporations or big-dollar donors — will you chip in $5 towards our grassroots campaign today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37247?source=em20211113-3438&t=1&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37247?refcode=em20211113-3438&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)**
Our campaign is about fighting for working families from *every single one* of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. Unlike typical Washington politicians, John won’t sacrifice his values for big bucks from corporate PACs.
Political consultants say that running a campaign as competitive and expensive as this one without corporate dollars can’t be done, but when you chip in $3, $5, or more at a time, you’re proving them wrong.
**[Contribute whatever you can to our campaign right now to stand up against corporate PACs and help us flip this seat!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37247?source=em20211113-3438&t=21&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37247?refcode=em20211113-3438&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)**
With gratitude,
— Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211113-3438-footer&t=23&refcode2=3438_434096_u63_xn&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3438%2E434096%2Eu63_xn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Friend,
**Joe Biden’s Build Back Better Bill will do anything but “build back better”.** He can’t “build back” something he’s destroyed!
In reality this bill is the largest tax increase in over 50 years! It will skyrocket inflation, grant functional amnesty to 7 million illegal immigrants, direct hundreds of billions MORE into climate change initiatives, put billions towards “climate justice” and “tree equity”, hire billions worth of IRS and Dept. of Labor officials, and leverage huge tax burdens on corporations and small businesses. **How is that building better?**
In the past weeks we have seen Americans with Commonsense stand up courageously to the radical left. _It’s time for Alaska to do the same._

It will skyrocket inflation, grant functional amnesty to 7 million illegal immigrants, direct hundreds of billions MORE into climate change initiatives, put billions towards “climate justice” and “tree equity”, hire billions worth of IRS and Dept. of Labor officials, and leverage huge tax burdens on corporations and small businesses. How is that building better? In the past weeks we have seen Americans with Commonsense stand up courageously to the radical left. It’s time for Alaska to do the same. It’s time to put an end to the everyday struggles that Joe Biden has created. Together we can build a future with commonsense solutions that will benefit the American people. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

body:
| | | Melanie’s proud to be part of Indivisible’s first endorsements of 2022, along with progressive powerhouses like Reps. Mondaire Jones and Pramila Jayapal.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: you should see this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! |
---
**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Fellow Conservative,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d97c87bc9e6744708f3e7f587c6a5818&_e=MmfxD1C27tdXmp1itcgRjU-WX9Yo_vpqx0RKDoL5Cr6bLn2NOoZkAG3T5pFRfhVetRxuZqAQokSC8wICc43klmqPknG8FFwfpRppAYqjq8lYCuDNcOwA5NcaNYPghMY3Ka-5w_0jtuRnJcXMMmlA2EYiXUG7pnz5lBMkfHa8LSsuuwqaLTkhu74hUfE8suoykAnR2UtnSKoDdUUnLbP_eDWKnQpLsWrLTvmlaDINMAs88Pk5fe476kmiGYji5j_JdMhK8J4yo5u3lu53LHLSXmcyfUrELg2Y8mo92zs67km4Unk7rRph4_gkr2T7g67rkDD1hnNWMaZF5-KKinAV9vYXkTc-YzneXIi7RKDyytYH88OQ8DvOb6v8MLcP1tFzu_i1a3h5FmpSVa4pFP3RkOHVJzvZMfUJGTSrb3HgtGwQRuPet4XkuTJifvO87Epm7ZL7slG_ocxsuQyOzzbJk9YzjsEfKcihmw16ixxgswk%3D)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. clean_body: Our race in GA has been declared a “toss-up.” This is our best opportunity to pick up a seat in the Senate! | ☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜ Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up Fellow Conservative, BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in. Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic." If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message. In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters. Take a look for yourself: I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up. While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column. Therefore, we must increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. My opponent was THE TOP FUNDRAISER IN THE ENTIRE COUNTRY over the last three months. We've got to be able to beat them at their own game. While the ratings change is certainly encouraging, it's also going to motivate the Democrats to double down. Please stand with us at this important moment. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Your Response Requested (via DCCC)
subject: Brian Williams calls it QUITS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you take our one-minute cable news survey before midnight tonight?
| | _**BREAKING: Anchor Brian Williams is LEAVING MSNBC**_
| | **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE REQUESTED:**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
We're in disbelief: We just learned that legendary anchor Brian Williams is LEAVING MSNBC!

We know this will have a MAJOR impact on the cable news landscape, so we're collecting data on how our best supporters get their news.

**Will you take our one-minute cable news survey before midnight tonight?**

_[Which Cable News Channel do you watch?>>](https://links.e.dccc.)_
---

** Response requested by **11/13/2021 at 11:59pm** **

We can't believe our eyes.

After DECADES at NBC and MSNBC, legendary anchor Brian Williams just announced he's leaving the network at the end of the year.

But that's not all.

We also just learned that Fox News is currently the **MOST VIEWED** cable news channel!!

**It 's horrifying: ****Fox 's far-right anchors are DEAD SET on attacking our Democrats and spreading dangerous lies.**

That's why, at this pivotal moment for cable news nationwide, Democratic HQ is conducting a MAJOR poll to determine which outlets our supporters are tuning into.

We're calling on 10,000 grassroots Democrats to take our one-minute poll before midnight and let us know who they trust with their news.
**Will you take our one-minute cable news survey before midnight tonight?**
| [LET US KNOW: Which Cable News Channel do you watch? >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thank you,

DCCC
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19.
